MicroClub
The Arrival / 📣announcements
! itsDjinane 29/10/2024 13:47

Welcome to the new ship! @MC BOUNADEM

Isn't it fun to switch up to new well-oiled gears? The change is not so foreign yet feels exciting! Discarding the charm of the old for the promise of the new is a move we're so glad to make with you, and we'll even be welcoming our new members here soon! But before I send you off to explore further and settle in, let's make sure we set the record straight (that's right, I'm about to pull THAT card ) The new server is mostly a technical and structural update, however , it is also an important fresh start for the community. Take this both as a sweet promise and a warning: Be mindful with each others, we'll be more inclined to set certain behaviours and comments straight from now on. Which means, one toe out of line through a comment nobody asked for or a joke that is insensitive and you might conjure yourself some fun DMs People are different, and so is their temperament - a wise person knows where their limits and boundaries are, be it in socializing or work. We count on you to be responsible and mature. Remember, this server is not your private friends group. Lets' focus more of our energy on bringing our best self forward, stay close, keep your cool Now that's that out of the way, Ready? Settle in , Set yourselves up for a successful continuation of your journey 🫡 and let's thrive even further together insh'Allah 🫶

! Amine ta3 MCC 31/10/2024 01:43
Salaaaaam @MC BOUNADEM We've got some infos to share as we make this shift to a fresh new server One of the main reasons we moved over was because our old server hit its role limit ... we couldn't add any more roles bla ma ne7eslo fwach men role nsupprimiw w wach men role nkheliw So, in this new space, we've only brought over the most essential roles and a few key event roles ... 3labalna beli ra7 tedilkom chwiya we9t bach twalfo bessa7 nchallah once twalfo ra7 tweli l'experience ta3kom smoother

here is a quick breakdown of what to expect:

  • Role Transfer: Only the most necessary roles have been added here, so you might notice some roles from the old server didn’t make the jump. If you feel something important is missing, let us know.
  • Bug Fixes w Adjustments: If you encounter any issues with roles, channel permissions, or other bugs, please feel free to #📩open-ticket ... we’ll look into it
  • Old Server Access: We haven’t deleted anything from the old server ... we’ve just hidden those channels for now. mor chwiya we9t, we’ll open the old server up again inchaallah. Thank you for being part of this new chapter with us
if you have any questions, you can reach out in #📩open-ticket and welcome again to our new home

Moussaab 03/11/2024 10:17
Hello @MC BOUNADEM I am so excited to announce our new DEV DEPARTMENT PROJECT — the HQ Game! Please take a moment to visit the game using the following Link. Try to solve the puzzle, escape the room, and enjoy the mini-games!

Special Thanks

A special thanks to our team @Local game for their hard work and dedication in bringing this project to life. Enjoy the game, and don’t forget to send us a picture when you escape the HQ! PS: Please visit the website on your PC for the best experience. Thank you!

Rania Trache 03/11/2024 13:43
Hi @MC BOUNADEM , I hope you’re doing well. As you know, Micro Code is a coding competition that is devided into two parts:
  • The online part: Which took place from October 28th to November 2nd.
  • IRL part: Only the top participants on the leaderboard will be invited to join the IRL phase, which will be held on Thursday, November 7th, at the Cultural Center Arezki Taboudouchte in Benaknoun. So, with a competition comes the selection of the staff.
Make sure you are free throughout the day and can assure your transportation. https://forms.gle/GFTApAcohQ9qUyco9 Good luck ! ps: the form will close Tuesday at 8 pm (20h)
Micro Code Staff
The IRL day of the Micro Code will be held in " Centre Culturel Arezki Taboudoucht, BEN AKNOUN" on Thursday, November 7, from 7:00 A.M to 3:30 P.M NOTE: Make sure you’re free and able to assure your transport. LOCALISATION: Centre Culturel Arezki Taboudoucht - Google Maps

! itsDjinane 09/11/2024 12:14

Welcome, welcome our dear new members @deleted-role !

the MicroClub family welcomes you with open arms, we're so excited to have you! The registration process is famously strict and exclusive, so major congratulations on earning your place with us here! You've made the right choice, we're not just a club here where you'll be pushing your academic and skillset limit, but also a family where you'll find friends, colleagues and collaborators for all kinds of your endeavors We're sure you've got an insatiable curiousity about the members, and the workings and operations of the MicroClub, and don't worry, we'll be sure to satisfy that thirst 🫡 Please do settle in, our members are most wholesome and welcoming, and we have a little event for you coming up soon where you get to meet the major players and get an idea of what this season has in store for you Congratulations again and get ready for an incredible journey with us—welcome to MicroClub!

Hello @MC BOUNADEM I hope everyone is doing well. Please note that the HQ (Local) will be closed tomorrow inshallah, le mardi 12/11/2024 From 1:00 PM till 4:30 PM, for a design department workshop. For our @deleted-role who joined us recently, we apologize for any inconvenience. Occasionally, we close the HQ to hold internal workshops exclusively for our sections or department members. Thank you for your understanding. Have a great night!

! itsDjinane 13/11/2024 01:32

Hello my dear @MC BOUNADEM

I hope you're all doing well.

We have a new opportunity in stock

Algeria 2.0 is coming back this November 19-23, 2024 and it has invited MicroClub as its co-organizer! The event is 5 days of conferences and workshops held at the Cyberpark of Sidi Abdellah, Algiers. It's the usual drill, similar to Educteck and DAS for for those of you unfamilair with this type of work. This is also the first opportunity open to our dear new members @deleted-role 🥹

Here are the forms:

Staff responsible form : for those who believe themselves capable of managing the staff on the D-day, the spot is open for two people (binome, if you will). Staff form : for those who can wish to work on the event (please be sure of your availibity before you fill!), transportation and T-shirts included! So what are you waiting for? Grab a spot!
Algeria 2.0 - The Future Algerian Tech
Immerse yourself in 5 transformative days of cutting-edge innovation, strategic networking, and intensive learning. Algeria 2.0 is the premier crossroads
Staff-Responsible Form "Algeria 2.0 event"
MicroClub is invited to co-organize Algeria 2.0 event in its 2nd edition! For those interested in taking responsibility of the event, the event will be held on the 19th, 20th,21st,22nd and 23rd of Novembre 2024 in "Cyberparc of Sidi Abdellah". Important: Only two would get picked. NOTE: Transportation will be provided. (From USTHB. To USTHB)
"Algeria 2.0 event" Staff Form
MicroClub is invited to co-organize Algeria 2.0 event in its 2nd edition! For those interested in joining, the event will be held on the 19th, 20th, 21st,22nd and 23rd of November 2024 in "Cyberparc of Sidi Abdellah" Please be certain of your availabilities before filling out the form. NOTE: Transportation will be provided. (From USTHB. To USTHB)

Salaam lmembers tawe3na @MC BOUNADEM kirakom ghaya I am here today to announce the ....

ICE BREAK 2024

We invite all of you surtout l@deleted-role to the ice break event where we’ll go over everything you need to know about the club: structure, leaders, and all the essentials to start smoothly your journey with us on the right foot So to confirm your presence please fill the form (meme ida marakomch sur tjo ... just in case) Event Details:
  • Date: Sunday the 17th of November 2024
  • Location: Auditorium, USTHB
IMPORTANT: if you study out of USTHB you have to fill the form with your NIN (National ID Number or Numero d'identité National) https://forms.gle/dyMf6C99bvY1YqB1A We’re really looking forward to seeing everyone there and starting this journey together with all of you !

! Amine ta3 MCC 15/11/2024 09:28
Salaaaam @MC BOUNADEM I hope you are doing good ! I'm here today to announce Members of the month and Honorable Mentions of October 2024 But first, let me explain to the @deleted-role what this is: Each month we do a little announcement win nkhiyro the most active members li daro khdma chaba li biyno ro7hom et ils/elles se sont démarqué kamel durant le mois ... yedo le titre ta3 "@Member of the Month" En plus des mention honorable from each department/section li ykounou des personnes qu'on veux honorer parce que daro khedma remarquable et qu'on veux remercier .. hado c'est les "Honorable Mentions" And all this recognition serve as a fantastic reward, motivating our members to push their limits and excel Bessa7 you need to deserve it !!! October was a big month for our department, marked by exceptional commitment and teamwork from the @Internal Relations & Human Resources team who demonstrated incredible dedication, particularly during the registration period It was a time of immense effort, long hours, and unwavering focus from every member, ensuring that the process was smooth and efficient F Octobre, two individuals stood out for their remarkable work and consistent presence ..... Sooo ... October's MoMs Areeeeeeeee

09:32

October's MoMs are @celine.mj and @Rania Trache

Whether it was handling the registrations, assisting members, or ensuring everyone felt welcomed, they were always there, giving their all and setting an example for everyone. Their hard work and positive energy were truly inspiring wellah ye3tikom sa7a for everything you’ve done But hold on, the excitement doesn't stop there .. Moving on to our Honorable Mentions From @IT: @يونس From @Game Dev : @Creepy From @Robotics: @CHROME From @Logistics & Events Management: @!LYES From @Design: @Oumaima 🎨 & @el grande nadjet From @Marketing : @! Sara Alaa & @eyness ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ From @Communication: @Neila From @External Relations : @Belaidi linda From @Multimedia: @Ishlati😽 From @Development : @Deleted User Great job everyone ! I hope this will motivate you to keep working ! Also j'espere que ca motive les autres tan bach yekhedmo bach tkono ntoma @MC BOUNADEM nchallah next MoM mantewelch fl hedra bezaf, CONGRATULATIONS once again

! itsDjinane 16/11/2024 12:32

THE ICE BREAK IS HERE!

Dear @MC BOUNADEM , especially dear @deleted-role , the yearly Ice Break is here! But wait, what's the Ice Break you may be wondering? It's the yearly event we hold especially in honor of our new members to introduce them, and finally get a chance to witness the great numbers and diverse range of personalities and characters of MicroClub members IN REAL TIME! Come see us, catch us at Salle Polyvalente, Village Universitaire, USTHB at 11AM tomorrow ! The event will comprise a whole presentation of what and who is MicroClub, what awaits you this year, who are the people taking the lead this season, and a bunch of activities and photos! One of our favorite internal events of the year, see you there! 🫶

! itsDjinane 06/12/2024 11:34
Good evening @MC BOUNADEM Good to spam you again we hope you're surviving and even thriving during this academic torture period. But worry not I'm not just here to spam, rather we got news! We're excited to share an incredible achievement by our @Development Department:

Micro Loaders !

A new open-source Flutter package featuring a collection of stunning animated loading indicators. This package made by our talented members, is designed to elevate the user experience (UX) of mobile applications. We're incredibly proud of the hard work and dedication our Dev team put in creating this valuable tool for the Flutter community, this department might be new but it's definitely carving out its place within the club! 🫡 Check it out and give it a go, we'd love to see what you can create and learn from it. The project is open source so you're invited to contribute : https://github.com/MicroClub-USTHB/micro_loaders Have fun with it and catch you another time! (edited)
micro_loaders | Flutter package
A collection of animated loaders with flutter made by micro club

! itsDjinane 14/12/2024 09:09

IDEATHON PRESENTATIONS ARE HERE!

Hello everyone @MC BOUNADEM I hope you're suviving well through this last week of the semester Now, after we made a huge deal not long ago about the IDEATHON (signing up, teambuilding, the online phase...), we have finally reached the IRL presentations days. When : the 15th (that's tomorrow!) and 16th of December Where : Cyberespace USTHB At what time : Opening ceremony launches at 9.30AM and the presentations keep going till 3PM! We invite you to join us and see what our @deleted-role cooked up through this last week! The event is internal so it's for MC members only, and you don't have to be a participant, jury, mentor...etc to come, you just come and see Catch you tomorrow! Goodnight.

! itsDjinane 15/12/2024 05:14
Hello @MC BOUNADEM We've got some amazing news over the weekend, MC members once again eat hackathons for breakfast Here are the news: We got members winning the SHINE event by VIC Where
  • 1st place : team AMADEUS
By @! Farid @el grande mh @Walid ababababa taking the leadership everywhere fr
  • 2nd place: : team FREEPIK
With our members @Lyes.® entering underscover 🫣
  • 3rd place: team MONTESRAT
By @سارة @Sky @el grande lina tagamedavit @Manel slayed og And all the way to Batna, in DEVFEST of all events (one of the best hackathons in Algeria) we had @Ramzy1453 @chachawi @ibti @Adem... winning first place ! Major GGs to the talented members, proving their skills, grit and determination to prove their excellence, hope they serve as the role model that they are to every other member. Not the first, not the last, we hope you always strive to improve yourselves and prove it to the world (edited)

Haku 17/12/2024 12:06
Hai Hai @MC BOUNADEM it’s been a while i didn’t write here, i hope you’re all doing amazing (doubt that vu que exam season is approaching but fiha khir). After a pretty active month for all sections and departments, we’ve come to the end of one of our most iconic internal events, and i genuinely hope our minions have started getting more comfortable and familiar with not only the way the club is structured, but also the way our members are constantly maintaining good vibes. Now to follow up with our monthly tradition, i’m here to announce one of our thriving members, who you’ve probably met countless times in the HQ (and especially in the ideathon at last), and who greatly showed up in both his section and department.

Congratulations to our November MoM @! KENPACHI

And to our honorable mentions who shined in their respective dep/ section:

  • From @IT : @Milene
  • From @Game Dev : @!Manou
  • From @Robotics : @نسرين
  • From @Logistics & Events Management : @Hiki
  • From @External Relations : @𓋼𓍊Asma
  • From @Communication: @Bahria
  • From @Design: @twe7chna el real me3za win rak ?
  • From @Multimedia: @leM(ovie)
  • From @Marketing: @mermeii <3
  • From @Development: @ guestaum
  • And last but not least from @Internal Relations & Human Resources : @NBA
GG for everyone who showed up for the club despite this busy period in terms of studies and tests, I genuinely hope to more and more thriving faces in the months coming up, Thank you for your work, and may it be some way to motivate our @deleted-role to be next, rebi iwefe9 and good night (edited)

Hello @MC BOUNADEM , I hope you're all doing well! I am here to inform you that MC will be holding a stand at La Grande Poste from December 20th to 22nd, from 9:30 AM to 4:00 PM. This will be a great opportunity for those who want to gain experience in managing a stand, especially for our dear minions it’s a chance to enjoy a new and enriching experience. This will be a great opportunity for those who want to gain experience in managing a stand, especially for our dear minions it’s a chance to enjoy a new and enriching experience. Before filling out the participation form, please ensure your availability for the event. Kindly note that transportation will not be provided. https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd64kb3-KxmdE6d0FbEtD4I3_uGThoC8c4jV9u76pk7Zq0OUg/viewform
! Amine ta3 MCC 19/12/2024 14:49
Salaaam @MC BOUNADEM @deleted-role Staff has been selected

1
el grande mh 20/12/2024 05:59

Salam @MC BOUNADEM Jumuaa mubaraka!

Hope you are doing well and enjoying your first day of vacation Still waiting for the Ideathon winners? Well, we’ve got some exciting news... but not about that XD We are thrilled to announce that the: # Registrations Are Now Open for the Design Sprint! Our first ever Design Sprint, an exciting, fast paced event where creativity and collaboration meet to solve a real world design challenge. Over three days (3jours), participants will immerse themselves in the end to end UX/UI design process from understanding user needs to crafting innovative solutions. During the 3 days of the event, you will: Understand and Empathize Explore the problem space and perform user research to understand the needs of the target audience. Define user personas and their pain points. Ideate and Define Brainstorm creative ideas to address the defined problems. Create user stories, establish design goals, and define the app's core functionality. Prototype and Test Develop a clickable prototype showcasing the core features. Conduct usability testing with hypothetical users and refine your solution. At the end of the sprint, teams will present their designs to a panel of juries, receiving constructive feedback on their process, creativity, and user centered approach.

Event Dates:

Online phase: Starts: Sunday, 22 Dec, 17:00 Ends: Tuesday, 24 Dec, 23:00 IRL Phase: Presentations & Voting: Wednesday, 25 Dec at USTHB For more details about the event you will find the Designer Guide bellow: Register now by filling out the form here: Registration Form Don't miss this opportunity to dive into the world of UI/UX design. Thank you!
The_Designer_Guide.pdf

! itsDjinane 21/12/2024 00:42
Ladies and Gentelmen of the @MC BOUNADEM community I am here to finally announce the IDEATHON 24-25 edition winners! And without further yap, here are our champions

For the 1st place, the Global Winners are:

MEGAMINDS !!

Team: @200IQMAHDI @Chill guy @ZNiGGa @Greenbriar @nassiba i @S A N O @unsss They also hold the title for Best Project

For the Best Startup winner we have:

SheCodes !!

Team: @Aicha @Amel @Hadul @I K R A M @Nour @Wissam @Wissem naïla Not just a girl, beasts!

For Best Event we have :

banana404 !!

Team: @Lynaa @Manel✨ @Maya @meyoumi @Tofa7a 🍎 @Souhir @Yasser 10/10 embracing the @deleted-role theme!

For Best Presentation we got :

Water Benders !!

Team: @!𝐬𝐬 @Belaidi linda @℉ayçaλ @Houda @! nazim @Noor @Thizirii They def bended the juries and audience to their wishes Bonus: Best dekhla : Chefs (if you know you know) Congratulations to everyone! Glory and flexing rights till the day you graduate and beyond Expect certificates and feedback in your inbox soon, and what do I have here? Multimedia has delivered your pictures! And this ladies and gentlemen, concludes the IDEATHON 24-25, thank you for being part of it But MC has got more in pockets for you, check out Design Sprint just lfo9a! (edited)

Rania Trache 22/12/2024 05:13
Hello @MC BOUNADEM , I hope you're doing well. I hope you're enjoying the start of your vacation take full advantage of this brief period of rest, as exam preparation will soon be on the horizon. And with exams comes the revision session on the MCC server. I come to you with some exciting news for those who excel or see themselves good in a particular subject and would like to share their knowledge to help other students with their revision. This is your chance to shine and help others! PS: We strongly encourage our little geniuses from the club to host these revision sessions. Think about how even the smallest piece of information you have could be of great help to others. https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScoSbDXWi4xvZhzAy_lg3Td8CP8JmgQFrYd1nv69O0gEoVrNw/viewform?usp=header
Révisions S1 24/25
If you're a little genius or you master a particular module and have a passion for sharing knowledge, then this opportunity is made for you! Note: the revision sessions will take place from December 27, 2024, to January 4, 2025, at 7:30 PM, on the MCC server. P.S : Please make sure you are available during the selected dates.

! Amine ta3 MCC 23/12/2024 02:32
Salaaaam alikom @MC BOUNADEM nchallah tkono bkhir Nchallah les vacances ta3kom bdaw bien w mabe3tolkomch projet m3a debut ta3 les vacances .... Aaaaanyways hhh Esem3oooo i'm announcing something important : It's time to update our members database Rakom chefto rana allah ibarek club armée and we have to keep track of this human mass w njibo vos informations Que ce soit par rapport a l'administration bach nbiyno beli les membres ta3na y'existiw w sa7 c'est des etudiants, wela par rapport a hna le club we need your informations to better serve you It's also finally time to select you sections for @deleted-role or to switch section for old members SO ... make sure to fill this form by clicking here Notes:

- This form is mandatory :

Li ma y3emerch had l form before the deadline, we will not consider him as member anymore
  • You must give us an adequate picture of yourself: The goal here is to first recognize you ki nkono n7ewso 3likom (f selections wela meme en general since rakom jaych mara7ch ne9edro ne3erfokom ga3) rakom bezaf fl club tsema bach meme hna ne3e9lokom surtout for li mayjoch bezaf l local .. machi ghost members .. also for MoM and HM posts, or general use
  • If you are not an USTHB student, you have to give us your NIN (National ID Number) hadak numero letwil ta3 carte d'identité bach ki t7ebo tjo l la fac ne9edro ndekhlokom easily
  • discord username .... medolna discord username machi ID (machi numerowat) w machi display name .. c'est hadak li yji bl minuscule w gris te7t display name ta3kom
  • It's essential to choose a section, even if you're an old member. You MUST fill out this form to confirm your section and membership, or you risk being KICKED OUT from the club ## DEADLINE: 16/01/2025 a 23:59 16/01/2025 14:59 ... ni plus. ni moins.

el grande mh 26/12/2024 07:37
Salam @MC BOUNADEM , The Design Department is proud to announce…

The Design Sprint Winners!

1st Place: Notorious – @el grande raniaa @Akram @el grande abdou @Abir @Meriem 2nd Place: المتفككون – @el grande lina tagamedavit @سارة @sousi @Alaa 3rd Place: Export 5X – @el grande lyna @el grande nadjet @Shiro @rymel @haruki Best Case Study Award: It’s Designasaurs XDDD – @Zaki @نسرين @ibti @twe7chna el real me3za win rak ? @ฅ ^• ˕ •^ ฅ A huge congratulations to all the winners for their outstanding work, your creativity, teamwork, and dedication throughout the Design Sprint truly shined. To everyone who participated, we are so proud of each and every one of you. You’ve demonstrated incredible talent and perseverance during this journey. We hope this experience taught you more about the fascinating world of UI/UX design, this is only the beginning so keep designing, keep creating, and keep inspiring! We’d like to thank everyone who helped make this event a success, from the Executive Members to all the Departments involved in the Design Sprint, you’ve done an amazing job in such a short time, and without your efforts, this event wouldn’t have been possible. See you in the next edition inchallah, for another exciting sprint! One sprint, endless possibilities.

Salaaam alikom @MC BOUNADEM Nchallah tkono bkhir, jewezto les vacances bien w revisito bien (hhh)

This is a reminder for you to fill the Data Gathering Form :

  • For Minions; bach tkono 3ndna your Data and to Select a Section
  • Meme OLD members HAVE to fill the form; to update our database, and in case t7ebo tbedlo section You may have some questions
- "I forgot if i filled the form. How can i know ida 3emerto wela lala ?" - "How can i be sure my answer is taken into consideration ?"
Check your roles. If you have the @deleted-role role, that means that you didn't fill (or hadn't filled in correctly) the form
  • If you didn't fill the form, fill it ! wach rakom testenaw ?
  • If you already filled the form bessa7 3ndkom the role, then reopen the form and edit your discord username, you probably wrote it wrong. If you think you filled it well, you can open a ticket #📩open-ticket and we'll check for you

DEADLINE: 16/01/2025 a 23:59 16/01/2025 03:59

ps: ida 3emerto l form mor had l announcement, you'll not get the Not Filled role removed ... you'll have to wait 7eta yekhlas deadline appart ca n9olelkom good luck pour vos examens rabi ywafa9kom nchallah (edited)

Haku 14/01/2025 12:50
Salam @MC BOUNADEM I hope you're all doing well and fine in this tiring period,

This is a reminder for those who havent yet to fill the data gathering form below

https://forms.gle/EmMjyZTi37U47Km49 Note:
  • Anyone who doesn't fill it, will no longer exist in our database and thus no longer be considered a member.
  • for @deleted-role , filling the form will allow you to select your section amongst the three( IT, Robotics & GameDev) for the season, and "officialize" your membership, (you existing in the database)
  • for oldies, you guys should be used to it by now, this is your opportunity to switch section for the season if wished, as you know already, section switching mid season is not allowed For those who have already filled but didn't get their roles yet, everyone will be updated at the same time when time is due so you don't have to worry about it now.

    Deadline: 16/01/2025 at 23:59 16/01/2025 14:59

    Thank you, rebi iwefe9kom in your exams and everything else in your life, stay safe and until next announcement take care so we can have you show up in all the upcoming activities and events, make sure to fill or else you wont be able to partake in them, and trust me you dont want to miss it

Salam everyone, nchallah tkono bkhir @MC BOUNADEM ! I hope your exams are going smoothly ! just one more week to go ma b9ach bezaf Now, on to some important and exciting news: the deadline for the data gathering form has been extended to January 31st at 23:59! 31/01/2025 14:59 This gives you a bit more time to complete it, but don’t wait too long. makach li y9oli makfanich lwe9t wela les examens Here’s why this form matters:
  • It helps us know you better. We want to ensure you’re part of the right section and that everything runs smoothly for the upcoming 24/25 season.

- The form is mandatory for EVERYONE.

Filling out the form is NOT optional. If you don’t complete it, you won’t appear in the club’s database. And if you’re not in the database, well, it means you won’t officially be counted as a member :/ So please, take a moment to fill it out if you haven’t already. Wishing you all the best for the rest of your exams you’ve got this https://forms.gle/EmMjyZTi37U47Km49 (edited)

Hello @MC BOUNADEM,

I'm excited to let you know that Departments registrations are now open! This is your opportunity to become a member of one of the club's Technical departments

Communication, Marketing, Multimédia, Development

and contribute to our exciting journey! The number of spots for each department is limited, so don't miss out on your chance to join. Note: People can register in one department and for people who want to change their actual departments you have to contact your current leaders Registration Link If you have any questions or encounter any issues, feel free to open a ticket in https://discord.com/channels/1282095800079351851/1294727254579871744/1294728623370141696 Also, we want to inform you that we are hosting a General Meeting this week: Wednesday 29/01 at 9.30pm Your presence is mandatory as we’ll be discussing important updates that concern everyone. https://discord.com/events/1282095800079351851/1333537845629030421 Have a great night. Abdelkrim Touat 30/01/2025 03:14

Salam Amazing @MC BOUNADEM !!

Hope you’re doing great! As you know, our biggest hackathon of the season is just around the corner! It will take place from Thursday 06/02 to Sunday 09/02 at the Cyber Espace of USTHB. With this epic event comes the staff selection process—a golden opportunity to gain experience, take on exciting challenges, and be part of an unforgettable adventure!
  • Spots are limited & The staff form closes on Sunday 02/02 23:59
  • Make sure to read the description carefully before applying!

Check your availability before filling out the form, last-minute changes won’t be tolerated .

  • For Saturday due to Doctorat Exams, no going out is allowed between 7am and 6pm , meaning for those selecting the friday night shift, you will have to either leave before 7 am or wait till 6pm,
As for entries no issue concerning that. Don’t worry if you’re unsure about what to do .Once selected, everything will be explained to ensure you’re fully prepared! We’re counting on YOU! Whether you're a newbie or a pro, everyone is welcome.

This is your chance to level up, connect, and make an impact! We can't wait to see you there!

https://forms.gle/uH8gXrSsV1ngv1N89 (edited)
Tatweer Staff Form
Important Information – Please Read Carefully Before filling out the form, make sure you are available on the specified dates and times to fully commit to the event. The hackathon will take place from Thursday, February 6, 2025, to Saturday, February 8, 2025, at the Cyber Espace, and on Sunday, February 9, 2025, at the auditorium of USTHB. ...

! AssiaLyna 01/02/2025 13:49
Hello MC family, Hope you’re having a good night for those li mzl mara9doch and good morning for those li rah ychofo l'annonce sbah. Inshallah, you’re all doing well .

Please read this carefully

We’re in the final stretch for Tatweer, and we need your help to make it happen!

1- We’re still missing some important logistics items for the event this weekend. If you can provide anything, check this list:

Tatweer's needs

If you have something from the list, please make sure to

  • label it with your name
  • fill out this form as demanded:

Stuff from members

The labels and filling the form, are two extremely important steps, to prevent any loss in your stuff

2- No matter what you’re bringing, please make sure to hand it directly to one of the following people:

  • Event Responsibles ( @Aïda or @! Ja3ffar )
  • OPS Leads ( @Adel or @! AssiaLyna )
  • Staff Responsibles ( @Imad_Eddine_BOUMAZA or @Sunshine🌞 )
  • Any Executive Member ( @! Farid @! itsDjinane @Chems @! عبد العالي )
  • Logistics Responsible ( @Yayat )

Every little help counts! Let’s make this event amazing together.

@MC BOUNADEM Thank you all , and may Allah bless you! (edited)
Tatweer's Needs

We’re in the final stretch for Tatweer, and we need your help to make it happen!

  • Logistics Responsible ( @Yayat )

Every little help counts! Let’s make this event amazing together.

@MC BOUNADEM Thank you all , and may Allah bless you! (edited)

Unfortunately , the local will be closed tomorrow for the entire day due to preparations for the one and only Tatweer.

A quick reminder to check the Tatweer's needs and see how you can contribute.

For those bringing items from home and planning to take them back after the event, please make sure to fill out this form

Thank you for your support and understanding!

Haku 10/02/2025 13:38
Salam @MC BOUNADEM here comes a long awaited announcement, (brace yourselves its gonna be long), These two last months were one of the busiest of the season, packed with 2 events, ideathon and design sprint and one event’s online organization (tatweer), our members shined once again, each in their respective departments and more, this is a heartfelt thank you for everyone who showed up despite the pressure, despite exams, and despite it being a first time for many of them. So in order to give recognition to where its due, we will start with December,

December’s member of the month is @arixstoo , for his brilliance in carrying the design sprint, a first time event for the design department.

December’s Honorable mentions:
  • From OPS: @yani
  • From Relex: @Belaidi linda
  • From Design: @Shiro & @el grande abdou
  • From Multimedia: @Dindarlik
  • From Communication: @Racha & @Anaïs Elektra
  • From Marketing: @mermeii <3
  • From Development: @! 0x_ax1m
  • From IT: @chahinez
  • From GameDev: @manalus
  • From Robotics: @nour18
  • From IR-RH: @seryne
47
29
6
13:39
Moving on to the month you’d expect to be quiet with not much work, but despite that, our members still found a way to outdo themselves and bring what they can for the club. Without further ado,

January’s members of the month are @Lamis Amari 🎨 and @el grande nadjet

January’s Honorable mentions:
  • From OPS: @Imad_Eddine_BOUMAZA & @Sunshine🌞
  • From Relex: @! nazim & @!𝐬𝐬
  • From Design: @سَــــٰارَه & @Mariaa (PRINCESS)
  • From Multimedia: @i-am_ine314 & @MEEEED213
  • From Communication: @̨؏ــبـدُ الجليل
  • From Marketing: @eyness ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ
  • From Development: @Sam!
  • From IT: @¬ nawel
  • From GameDev: @tired lich
  • From Robotics: @le crap & @rymel In recognition of all efforts made during these two months, in the behind the scenes of three events and more, your work doesnt go unnoticed, and it bears its fruits one way or another, so keep showing up and keep seizing bigger opportunities, it'll only teach you more and more, a heartfelt Thank you once again and see you next month

! itsDjinane 11/02/2025 08:55
Helloo @MC BOUNADEM I hope rakom ma7 🫶 I know that a big part of you kano khdmo or participaw f Tatweer , and some of you attended, Well I hope you had a grand time, and @Micro Club still has a LOTT coming up, deja two events are being worked on at the moment are coming soon! And for the smooth continuation of what's upon us, we'd like to make a little tweak to open opportunities and make things more fun for people interested in the upcoming events. And for this, from now on, when it comes to internal events, (internal khawti, read that twice!)

Organizers CAN participate ! But there is a catch though

There is a catch of course! As long as the work assigned to them is surface level, 7ab y9ol, as long as you're not aware of the themes wela 3ndk big responsibility (team lead, representative, responsible of some team within your department's team., someone with a big workload..etc) And how will you know if you can also participate? Reach out to the @Internal Relations & Human Resources 's representative of that event and they'll be able to discern if your participation is possible. That's all I came to say my friends, gear up because many initiatives will bloom this semester, and it's your chance to either be part of making it happen, or get the glory of participating it in 🫡

seryne 19/02/2025 13:19
Hey @MC BOUNADEM! I hope you are doing well. The moment you have been waiting for is here: The DESIGN and LOGISTICS & EVENT MANAGEMENT (OPS) departments are starting their recruitment! If you wish to join one of these departments, don't hesitate to fill out the form. It's a great opportunity to showcase your talent, deepen your knowledge in the field, acquire new skills, and experience new things. The form will close 25th,february 2025 so don't miss this opportunity! https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScAXhIzqx9BPLAKZT9bXooiKI1uLiQKBFt80UW6OCo01Q2I2w/viewform?usp=dialog important : However, I would like you to note this regarding the recruitment in the logistics & event management (ops) department: recruitment will not be done solely through the form; the form simply allows interested individuals to show their interest to the department So, for those filling out the form, do not expect a quick response, as they need to see you in action before making their decision. Your responses can influence their perception and give you better chances. But your work will be more decisive. Please read carefully the descriptions and if you have question don't hesitate tag @OPS Leads or @Internal Relations & Human Resources Good luck to everyone! (edited)

! Amine ta3 MCC 26/02/2025 12:18
Salam Salam @MC BOUNADEM ! ki rakooom I hope everything is going smoothly for you I'm here bach nehderelkom 3la an important category in the MC Server: MC 911 (#📩open-ticket) . As stated in the CoC and known to many of you, this space is exclusively dedicated to handling concerns that members wish to bring to the Internal Department or the Executive Board What can you use MC 911 for ? This category exists to ensure your voice is heard. You can open a ticket for:
  • Reporting uncomfortable situations or inappropriate behavior you’ve witnessed or experienced.
  • Sharing suggestions for events or club improvements.
  • Giving feedback on club activities and initiatives.
  • Sharing useful resources that could benefit the members.
  • Any other club related concerns or inquiries. Who had access to your tickets ?
l3ibad li ye9edro ychofo your tickets are:
  • @Medic
  • @Internals Leads
  • @Executive Members
These designated team members are committed to handling your submissions with professionalism and confidentiality. If you prefer to discuss your concern privately, please feel free to reach out directly to a Medic member f DMs The new Medic Team The Medic Team is responsible for reviewing and addressing tickets They are here to ensure a smooth and effective handling of all matters submitted in MC 911 Our current (new) Medics are:
  • @celine.mj
  • @NBA Whenever you need assistance, don’t hesitate to #📩open-ticket
We’re here to help Edekhlo berk f channel, click on the "Create Ticket" button, yetefte7 a channel (asmo par exemple "ticket-0298") w eketbo fih Voila rani kemelt about medic

Mazal !!! kemlo e9raw

Important info about TOMORROW
  • Local ra7 yeghle9 from 10h to 13h for a reel filming
Please 9bel ma yeghel9o local edo vos affaires bach ma teb9awch dakhlin kharjin haka ma nderangiwhomch aaand that's it ... hdert bezaf stay safe rebi 3awenkom

Hello dear @MC BOUNADEM You know everytime I show up here I have something cooking to share, and this time is no different, hadi l mera jbtlkommm

Midseason feedback form!

This is your golden opportunity to not only contribute to the betterment of our beloved club MAIS also a chance tferegh 9lbk kolesh anonymous w optional Please take a few moments of your time to check it out 🫶 More information in the form's description! And of course today is a great day, I am glad you're all with us today to celebrate the first of the holy month Ramadhan! Ramadhan Mubarak my brothers and sisters, we're all very lucky to be included in Allah's mercy another year, please be sure to not waste this chance, plan your days well, Ramadhan isn't a month for a very unhealthy and distracted lifestyle, rather it's to cultivate THE lifestyle that would earn your your dounia and akhirah, so lock in 🫡 And of course MC has prepared a few initiatives so keep your eyes on what's coming Have a good evening and see you soon!

MahdiDbh 03/03/2025 14:03
Hello @MC BOUNADEM !!!!! Hey Djinakom ! As usual, I’m bringing you a new activity! Let me introduce you to our latest activity:

ITea Talk

What is ITea Talk?

ITea Talk is a talk style activity or podcast where we invite a guest to present their projects, share their experiences, and walk us through the steps they took (chwiyakima dev q terau ya oldies ). Whether it’s development, AI, games, robotics, or other fields, our guests will introduce their work and share valuable insights. We will also explain new fields, break down interesting articles, and discuss various technical topics. Through ITea Talk, you'll explore new ideas, learn about different technologies, and gain knowledge in a fun and engaging way, no matter your skill level!

Meet the Managers!

The amazing team working on ITea Talk includes: @khalil .T , @BECCA and @Nesrine Don’t hesitate to reach out to them if you have any questions or need more information!

When & Where?

Check out the ITea category ITea Talk will take place every Friday in the ITea Voice channel https://discord.com/channels/1282095800079351851/1345517795462348843 . Let's experience IT

seryne 15/03/2025 12:10
Hello @MC BOUNADEM ! Hope you are doing well. First of all, Ramadan Mubarak and Saha ftourkom to all! This past month has been a little quieter than the previous ones, but that doesn't mean the work stops! Many of you have worked very hard on past events, including Tatweer, which was a success thanks to everyone's contribution. In parallel, you have also worked on the Djezzy event which will also be insha'Allah a success thanks to the work you have provided and that you continue to provide. Not to mention all the people who organized and worked on the activities and projects of their section. We would like to sincerely thank you for your dedication, seriousness and efforts.

The member of the month of February is Imad Eddine Boumaza @Imad_Eddine_BOUMAZA and Belloula Nour El Yaqine @Sunshine🌞 for the exceptional work they provided for Tatweer. You have shown great efficiency and remarkable management! Thank you so much!

February's Honorable Mentions:
  • From OPS: zeghba salah eddine @Salah-taeMultOps
  • From Relex: BELHOCINE Rayan @!! justLeR
  • From Design: ARAB Rimel @rymel and Hocini Meriem @Meriem
  • From Multimedia: yahyaoui mounir @M0uИ1R
  • From Communication: HAMDAOUI Mehdi @Mehdi
  • From Marketing: Bensalem Mohamed amine @ATG and ziane mohamed @mouh
  • From Development: amine charef @! 0x_ax1m
  • From IT: Khalil Touil @khalil .T
  • From GameDev: Bouali Mouanes @Sonic
  • From Robotics: Djerroud Ilane Samy @ILANE
  • From IR-RH: BENNACEF Nawfel Abdeldjalil @NBA Congratulations to everyone!

! itsDjinane 20/03/2025 13:03
Good evening @MC BOUNADEM Jitkom b ANNOUNCEMENT KBIIR this time! We’ve finally set up a system for…

CROSS ROLES!

So, what are these?

In the simplest way possible: you can now have two department roles at once! Fun, eh?

How does this work?

First things first, this applies to departments only for now. All departments are open—no restrictions on which ones you can mix! This is not for everyone, only for active members who are :
  • Members with a MOM title
  • Members with an HM title (in their current department or the one they want to join)
  • Ex-event responsibles
  • Ex-team leads & assistants
  • Ex-bureau members

Why these people specifically?

This is kinda like an honor system for those who took on big responsibilities in the club. These people have already proven their commitment, so we trust they won’t ghost this initiative. And it does serve as a something to aim for no? want this cool bonus? level up your game with us!

How do you get a cross role?

EXCLUSIVELY through HR. You must open a ticket, HR will review your request, check with the departments concerned, and get back to you with the verdict. Also note that :
  • If you have two department roles, you must pick ONE per event. No organizing under both at the same time.
  • If you get promoted to team lead or assistant, you must let go of your second role.
  • if you have two warnings, you are ineligible.
  • yes yes yes this applies to both past and present people with these titles! Hadi hiya, we hope this idea brings our community closer and open new doors and opportunities, so if you qualify and feel like you're ready, why not? Have a blessed Ramadhan day my dears , especially the upcoming nights!! make the most of them
and see you next!
81

Rania Trache 03/04/2025 13:36

DEAR @MC BOUNADEM Hackiwha – Where IT All Begins!

April 10, 11 & 12, 2025 Maison de jeunes Abderrahmane LAALA Whether you're part of Game Dev, IT, or Robotics, HackiWha is your playground. Three days to create, experiment, and innovate alongside those who share the same passion. This isn’t about fierce competition—it’s about bringing ideas to life, forming teams, and seizing opportunities. No matter your experience, what truly matters is taking the leap. Ready to be part of the adventure? Fill this form. It’s your move ! https://forms.gle/Cq1jbJh6nBkaGNQD7 Important Information:
  • Transportation will not be provided.
  • Here is the location of the place: https://g.co/kgs/c1vUcTn
## - Note: Hackiwha is beginner-friendly, so it’s a great opportunity for newcomers to dive in and show what they can do! (edited)
Hackiwha 2.0 Registrations
Ready to discover your potential? Join us at HackiWha from April 10 to 12 at La Maison des Jeunes Salombier! It’s will be you opportunity to learn new skills, challenge yourself, and be part of a community of talented people. Location: La Maison des Jeunes at Salombier Team Size: 4 members per team.

Rania Trache 04/04/2025 12:06
Dear @MC BOUNADEM, As you know, Hackiwha is just around the corner! To help those of you who are still hesitant to take the leap—or simply want to better understand what a hackathon is—we’ve planned an inspiring talk.

Tomorrow, April 5 at 8:30 PM, on 🔊MC Gathering,

we’ll be hosting @!lain , an ex-IT Core Team member who has participated in and won several hackathons. He’ll be sharing his journey, his advice, and his experience with hackathons. This is a unique opportunity to dive into the world of hackathons, ask your questions, and maybe… take that first step!

IMPORTANT NOTICE:

  • The form will close on April 5, 2025 at 11:59 PM.
https://forms.gle/Cq1jbJh6nBkaGNQD7
  • Don’t hesitate to form your teams in the #⚔team-building
This is your chance. Your opportunity.
Hackiwha 2.0 Registrations
Ready to discover your potential? Join us at HackiWha from April 10 to 12 at La Maison des Jeunes Salombier! It’s will be you opportunity to learn new skills, challenge yourself, and be part of a community of talented people. Location: La Maison des Jeunes at Salombier Team Size: 4 members per team.

Rania Trache 05/04/2025 10:38
Hi @MC BOUNADEM I hope you’re doing well I’m here to announce some exciting news about Hackiwha!
  • You can participate online !, as long as 2 members of your team can attend the opening and closing ceremonies.
Mention this in the “Anything to add” section of the form.
  • Staying overnight is not mandatory.
  • If your team isn’t complete yet, no worries!
You can still fill out the form — we’ll complete your team.

The form closes in a few hours, don’t miss your chance!

Reminder:

Today, April 5 at 8:30 PM on ⁠🔊MC Gathering, Don’t forget to join the talk with @!lain , ex-IT Core Team member and hackathon champ. Come hear his tips, stories, and journey — perfect if you’re thinking about joining Hackiwha!

STAFF SELECTION FOR HACKIWHA 2.0 IS OFFICIALLY OPEN – especially for new faces

Have you always wanted to see what happens behind the scenes of a hackathon? Now’s your chance! April 10, 11 & 12, 2025 Maison de jeunes Abderrahmane LAALA – El Madania Find the form here: Hackiwha 2.0 Staff Registration

Important Notes:

  • Members who have their own means of transportation are highly appreciated,
as they help ensure smooth logistics and efficient support throughout the event.
  • Food will not be provided for staff members during the event.
You are kindly asked to either bring your own meals from home or be prepared to cover your own food expenses.
  • Staff form will close on april 8 at 10 pm Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

9
6
Chems 07/04/2025 14:19

Hello @MC BOUNADEM

I hope you're all doing well and had a great day! I’m so excited to announce that Micro Club is a co-organizer of the ICT Africa Summit 2025! But wait, what is the ICT Africa Summit? It’s a fusion of 3 major events: Digital Africa Summit, ICT Maghreb, and Alvetic. This summit brings together the best of these tech expos, creating Africa’s largest and most influential tech gathering. The event will focus on innovation, cutting edge technology, high level networking, and opportunities to connect with industry leaders, startups, and key decision makers across Africa. This edition is extra special because it merges three different events, making it unlike any previous one. It will resemble Educatek in terms of exhibitions and activities. For this we need a Staff Responsible to oversee and organize the staff during the event days. Dates: April 21–23, 2025 Location: Palais des Expositions, SAFEX, Algiers If you’re interested in this role, please fill out this form and join us in this incredible experience! For more details, feel free to ask in https://discord.com/channels/1282095800079351851/1296206726848188496

Note:

  • The form will close on April 10 at midnight.
  • The staff form will be dropped in the next few days See you soon chabiba and good luck ^^
Staff-Responsible Form "ICT Africa Summit 2025"
MicroClub is invited to co-organize ICT Africa Summit 2025! For those interested in taking responsibility of the event, the event will be held on Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday the 21st, 22nd, 23rd of April the 2025 in the Palais des Expositions, Safex, Alger

Hello @MC BOUNADEM ! Hope you're all doing well and sorry for the late spam . I’m reaching out to ask for help with Hackiwha needs. If you’re coming tomorrow and can bring any of these things, we would be very happy! Here’s what we need:
  • Prayer rugs (as many as possible)
  • rallonges (as many as possible)
  • Resistance (1 or 2)
  • Game consoles (1) w les CDs ila 3andkom
  • Cleaning needs (whatever you can bring: nechaf, sanibon, lingettes, trash bags, paper, soap, OMO, etc.)
Please bring them directly with you to Dar Chabab and give them to @! KENPACHI , @Salah-taeMultOps , or anyone from OPS team there. Thank you so much! Your help means a lot and makes the event better for everyone.

Hey @MC BOUNADEM, I hope you are doing well! I wanted to let you know that the MGV staff has already been selected. important : However, there is a slight change of venue: the event will not be held at the Beaux-Arts, but at the Start Up of the USThB University. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact @Internal Relations & Human Resources HR team.

! AssiaLyna 24/04/2025 14:58
Hello @MC BOUNADEM , Hope you’re having a good night for those li mzl mara9doch and good morning for those li rah ychofo l'annonce sbah. Inshallah, you’re all doing well . Please read this carefully We’re in the final stretch for MGV, kima 3labalkom ghodwa rah yendar and we need your help to make it happen! 1- We’re still missing some important logistics items for the event ghodwa nchallah. If you can provide anything, check this list:

MGV's needs

If you have something from the list, please make sure to label it with your name fill out this form as demanded:

Stuff from members

The labels and filling the form, are two extremely important steps, to prevent any loss in your stuff 2- Whatever you’re bringing, make sure to hand it directly to one of the following people: OPS Lead: @! AssiaLyna Staff Responsibles: @Djo^^ or @!LYES OPS Team: @Yayat @! Redha ta3 MCC @!!Watson @!LYES. @Salah-taeMultOps Every contribution matters, no matter how small. Let’s join forces and make this event unforgettable Thank you all May Allah bless you!

8
7
! Farid 02/05/2025 10:06

Dear @MC BOUNADEM

Assalamu alaykum, I hope this message finds you well, inshallah. Today, I'm here not for an event or anything related to our activities. This time, it's something truly important and urgent. We always say we’re a family, one unit that stands together fel hlowa ou mora, We've proven this many times before, and now it's time to prove it once again. One of our dedicated member who has contributed immensely to this club with unwavering effort and passion has a family member (more precisely, a sister) who is very sick and her condition is critical. She urgently needs an operation outside of Algeria as soon as possible. After discussion between the executive members, we’ve decided to organize une collection d'argent to help our friend and valued club member. The required amount is quite significant, so every contribution matters. Out of respect, the person’s identity will remain anonymous . She needs to be there by June 1st, inshallah, so our goal is to collect the needed amount before that date. Li tekedro eliha ou li heb ymed, merhba ! The persons who’ll be in charge of the collect: @! Farid @Chems @! عبد العالي @! itsDjinane Ki jozo lel club ila l9ito ay wa7ed men hado madolo Jazakum Allahu khayran for your generosity and solidarity. Have a good day Thank you !

63

! Farid

Walidozich 03/05/2025 10:33

Salam @MC BOUNADEM j'espre que vous allez bien

Since the exams are already here we intend to start the Revision sessions , so for everyone who believes that SHARING IS CARING and is willing to help his brothers and sisters in some Subjects li ymaitrisihom chwiya , PLEASE OPEN A TICKET explaining:
  • The subject(s) you wanna teach
  • The number of sessions you wanna do
  • The DAYS and HOURS when you will be available
and we will take care of the rest. Thanks in advanced for your initiative that won't pass unnoticeable , و أجركم على الله !!

! itsDjinane 04/05/2025 11:10
Helloo asdi9a2i t3 @MC BOUNADEM Here to wish you super good luck in the upcoming phase! Thank you so much for each and everyone of you who have been part of the many initiatives taken in the club recently, many of you gave much of their time and effort towards MicroClub and now it's time to lock in for the exams phase, rabi ywaf9kom, do your best,and work hard enough you won't need the luck aslan ! Remember : اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا، وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبا، وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا P.S: Check out the message up I'm replying too, we're still collecting money for our friend, Just like we strive in our exams as it is our Dunyah, we must strive for our Akhirah, قال رسول الله ﷺ: "من فرّج عن مسلم كربةً من كرب الدنيا، فرّج الله عنه كربةً من كرب يوم القيامة."

Dear @MC BOUNADEM

Assalamu alaykum, I hope this message finds you well, inshallah. Today, I'm here not for an event or anything related to our activities. This time, it's something truly important and urgent. We always say we’re a family, one unit that stands together fel hlowa ou mora, We've proven this many times before, and now it's time to prove it once again. One of our dedicated member who has contributed immensely to this club with unwavering effort and passion has a family member (more precisely, a sister) who is very sick and her condition is critical. ! itsDjinane 22/05/2025 13:04
Hello @MC BOUNADEM Eeeeh finally thannina (or did we ) Now that we wrapped up exams, if you're thinking of productive ways to spend your upcoming free time, and help out you community, we're offering you MCC moderators positions! MCC is going through a revamp phase, soon it'll be a very lively community thanks to the teams working on it in the shadows to launch a healthier livlier digital community, and we require YOUR help to make sure we keep things in check in our neighbouring server. As a moderator, you'll be working closely with HR and the communication department, you can say you'll kind of be the HR of MCC basically. Your job would include going over chats, aiding in workshops, and keeping the community healthy by helping those in need of technical or behavioural aid. What we require, is a bit of time (this is not a time consuming job really, it's pretty light, especially since you'll be working with a full team), a deft hand at handling Discord, and a love for order If you're interested, be sure to sign up and join us! The form closes on the 26th of May 2025 https://forms.gle/H3YZbmMQ6nPmUPwn6 P.S: please check the message I'm replying to, the collection is still ongoing, and your benevolence will be appreciated in here and the hereafter
Sign up to be an MCC moderator!
Hello MicroClub-ers Now that we wrapped up exams, if you're thinking of productive ways to spend your upcoming free time, and help out you community, we're offering you MCC moderators positions! MCC is going through a revamp phase, soon it'll be a very lively community thanks to the teams working on it in the shadows to launch a healthier livl...
41
! itsDjinane
Hello @MC BOUNADEM Eeeeh finally thannina (or did we ) Now that we wrapped up exams, if you're thinking of productive ways to spend your upcoming free time, and help out you community, we're offering you MCC moderators positions! MCC is going through a revamp phase, soon it'll be a very lively community thanks to the teams working on it in the shadows to launch a healthier livlier digital community, and we require YOUR help to make sure we keep things in check in our neighbouring server. As a moderator, you'll be working closely with HR and the communication department, you can say you'll kind of be the HR of MCC basically. Your job would include going over chats, aiding in workshops, and keeping the community healthy by helping those in need of technical or behavioural aid. What we require, is a bit of time (this is not a time consuming job really, it's pretty light, especially since you'll be working with a full team), a deft hand at handling Discord, and a love for order If you're interested, be sure to sign up and join us! The form closes on the 26th of May 2025 https://forms.gle/H3YZbmMQ6nPmUPwn6 P.S: please check the message I'm replying to, the collection is still ongoing, and your benevolence will be appreciated in here and the hereafter

GameMaster Application Form : Round 2!
We're opening recruitement for the now iconic role : THE GAMEMASTERS Other than having a super cool name, what the GAMEMASTERS will do is : Hold weekly chill activities Literally that's all (kinda), GAMEMASTERS will be the fun makers, each week, you'll be required to host an activity or two that brings the community together, be it playing gam...

7
NANOVIĆ 31/05/2025 12:05

Good Evening @MC BOUNADEM

I hope you’re doing well and that you’ve survived the boss that is le9raya For those of you who didn’t beat your demons and are struggling with rattrapage or PFE, I wish you all good luck, and know that I believe in you (you can do it!) . Anyway, let’s not talk about the boring stuff and get to business, because I don’t know if you guys have noticed, but some new channels have magically emerged in the game dev category. Now, this means many things are coming… What awaits you all is our finest creation yet, named The Golden Interlude , which is going to include many fun things such as challenges, activities, and talks that we’ve prepared for you, all to help you enjoy the upcoming summer season . And yes, there is a prize: the legendary Golden Ticket that many have desired. Now I’m sure many of you would like to know more about it and the Golden Ticket. For that, we’re preparing a small opening ceremony where we’ll explain everything in detail So if you’re interested and want to be part of the fun, make sure to get your role here https://discord.com/channels/1282095800079351851/1378088018015158353 # Join the fun, everyone! I promise you won’t regret it, and maybe you will be the one to acquire the Golden Ticket to the new land of wonders

May Allah accept all your prayers and sacrifices 🫶 On this holy day, we remember the reward of obedience to Allah, we thank him for a successful conclusion of the Hajj season and the chance to make duaa during these past holy days. Remember to share your blessing and sacrifice today with your neighbours, friends and family, including MC family! Easy on the meat Have a blessed day @MC BOUNADEM

el salam alaikum @MC BOUNADEM i hope 3ayatdo mli7 and goodluck ratrrapage /PFE I am here to announce that the local will be closed tommorow all day (8:00 - 16:00) for robotics projects Thank you very much and goodluck la3dzaz (edited)

! عبد العالي 11/06/2025 10:14

Hello @MC BOUNADEM

You probably remember la collect we organized not long ago to support the sisters of our friend. Today we’d like to share a heartfelt message from her mother, who wanted to personally thank you for your support. Here is her message: Lettre adressée aux membres de MicroClub_USTHB Objet: Remerciements pour votre soutien Je tiens à exprimer, au nom de toute ma famille, ma profonde gratitude au microclub_USTHB pour votre généreuse contribution financière, qui a grandement facilité le départ de ma fille, pour ses soins médicaux en Tunisie, prévu le 15/06/2025. Votre geste de solidarité nous a profondément touchés et nous a permis d'aborder cette étape difficile avec un peu plus de sérénité. Dans ces moments délicats, votre soutien a été bien plus qu'une aide financière il a été un véritable réconfort moral. Merci du fond du cœur pour votre humanité, votre engagement et votre mobilisation. Avec toute ma reconnaissance, Famille de la malade, grands et petits Cordialement: Les Parents. I believe her words hold deep meaning for all of us. Thank you again for your contribution and kindness. And always remember: MC was never just a club, and it never will be. Good luck to you all!

Rania Trache 22/06/2025 15:05
Hello dear @MC BOUNADEM We hope you’re enjoying the start of your well-deserved holidays! And to those still facing RATTRAPAGE, we wish you good luck and strength — you’ve got this! After a small pause in our activities during the exam period, we’re back with a little April recap! It was a month full of events — between Hackiwha, DAS, MGV...etc April definitely kept us busy! So let’s take a moment to recognize and appreciate the members who kept giving their best, even in the middle of all the academic hustle. The long-awaited moment is finally here!

Member of the Month – April

Zeghba Salah Eddine @Salah-taeMultOps For his outstanding involvement and reliability across multiple tracks — a truly inspiring example of commitment! And of course, we couldn't forget to highlight those who shined in their own way:

Honorable Mentions – April

From Relex: Belhocine Rayan @!! justLeR From Design: Lina Haddad @el grande lina tagamedavit From Multimedia: Houas Younes @unsss & Hamroun Mohand @Mohand From Communication: Benlarbey Lyna @michaelwave From Marketing: Bensalem Abderrahim @RaaHxm & Boudiaf Kounouz @Kounouz From Development: Younès Bensafia @! يُونس From IT: Kouchkar Maria Kaoutar @0xmario From GameDev: Mezghiche Mohamed El Mahdi @200IQMAHDI From Robotics: Zidane Anaïs Melyssa @_Anaïs_ From IR-RH: Mahfoufi Seryne @seryne From Ops: Ramdani Ilyes @!LYES. & Deghbar Djouhara @Djo^^ Thank you to everyone who kept the spirit alive despite the workload! You make this club stronger every day Congratulations to all, and stay tuned for the next round of recognitions! (edited)

Good evening @MC BOUNADEM

The Long awaited MICROJAM is finally back !

I hope y'all are HYPED to join and witness the most memorable internal gamejam in MC Shoutout to the @deleted-role team for working on it and giving their fullest to make it happen and ofc didicass lel @deleted-role and @deleted-role for this teaser aswell!

And that's why

We invite you 🫵 to join the general meeting scheduled tomorrow at 8.30pm to get to know more about the event and the essence of a gamejam so don't miss out! Enjoy and Stay Tuned and of course RIGHT BACK AT JAM https://discord.com/events/1282095800079351851/1387157157165666384

Chems 30/06/2025 14:42

Hooolaa @MC BOUNADEM

Hope you're doing great and enjoying your vacation! Sooo, i'm here to share with you some important updates and clarifications regarding our upcoming event: Micro Jam 2.0

Registrations are officially open again

Due to some unexpected changes, the event will now be fully online, starting from July 6th. , that means no IRL this time. Also, you don’t need a team to register ! You can register individually, then build your team once you join the event server. The event is not limited to just the Game Dev section, it's open to everyone from different departments, and team size is flexible. So... what are you waiting for ?!!!! Join Micro Jam and experience a unique, creative challenge, a chance you won’t want to miss! Here’s the participation form https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfzAhOT-gH9ryxMqQH6qvqUvI99za6xVMOrvfHpHpPKA2jtaQ/viewform

NB: The form will close on July 3rd at midnight.

We’re excited to see what you'll build. Good luck and have fun !
MicroJam 2025 Registrations
Ready to Level Up? Join the MicroJam! From July 6th to 12th, dive into MicroJam a space to explore ideas, build games, and connect with creative minds. Whether you're a developer, designer, artist, or storyteller, MicroJam is your chance to code, create, and collaborate! Team Size: flexible. Important: The event is held on o...

! itsDjinane 08/07/2025 12:33
Helloo @MC BOUNADEM

I'm here to ask for your attention, support and love to the new rework of MCC!

But first, what do you mean you're not in MCC? Don't let me catch you lacking like that! Here is the link : https://discord.gg/26Rv3RET43

So, what's up with MCC?

Well, not only does it now represent a huge part of great efforts put in by the members of our club. But you'll find the familiar ITEA talks have migrated there, OPS are now operating under the name SKILLZ where they hold workshops and talks according to a variety of themes! And give exclusive mcc stickers for disntiguished partipants! @deleted-role are now also operating on MCC, to share the joy and fun, as the more the merrier we'll also be sharing behind-the-the-stage content through MCC diaries,not only about our events, but also shouting out our members, curious? well stay tuned so if you're looking or a productive way to spend a few hours a week of your summer, we invite you to MCC, it's all the efforts of our own MC members so you know the quality won't be lacking As the upcoming period is highly promotional for the server, I ask you to try to be a bit more active on it, and if you have a few boosts to spare, why not. Start by supporting this announcement! https://discord.com/channels/764214722836430848/764214722836430851/1392226617421463672 Thank you in advance and barak Allh fikom 🫶 (edited)

Nassim.Hs 20/07/2025 13:04
Hello @MC BOUNADEM, Hope you're all doing well and enjoying your summer so far! June often feels like a transition, exams ending, holidays starting, and many going quiet. But even in that shift, some kept the fire alive. With events like Micro Jam, HackOPS, and Cyber Combat 2nd Edition, it was clear: the spirit never really paused. So, before we jump into what’s ahead, we want to take a moment to look back and appreciate the incredible work some of you have been doing lately. That said, let’s get to the exciting part... June’s Members of the Month are : AISSAT Lyna @el grande lyna & TOUAA Mohamed @Shiro Whether through their involvement, consistency, or reliability, these members pushed things forward and made a difference. And of course, behind every standout performance, is a strong squad. June’s Honorable Mentions go to : From OPS: BOURAS Mohamed Redha @! Redha ta3 MCC From Relex: CHERFAOUI Mohamed Amine @Aminoss From Design: AMRAOUI Azeddine @azou_adn From Multimedia: OUAHIB Elyes @!yasuu From Communication: KISSOUM Nidhal @W H Y From Marketing: BOUSSAHA Sara Alaa @! Sara Alaa & KENNOUCHE Mouad @.٨٢ From Development: HADJ ARAB Adel @? عادل From IT: SKENDRAOUI Amel @Amel From GameDev: NOUREDDINE Hadil Narimane @haruki & HOUAS Younes @unsss From Robotics: ABDOUNI Roumaissa @Milfaya From IR-RH: CHERCHALI Mohamed Walid @Walidozich Let’s keep the energy rolling. the next chapter is yours to write.

Chems 21/07/2025 04:43

Hello @MC BOUNADEM

J’espère que vous allez bien ! We have a new stand opportunity. An event called Wajahni will be held to help new baccalaureate students choose their specialties, and Micro Club has been invited to participate with a stand. Location: Centre Culturel d’El Mouradia map Date: 23–24 July 2025 If you’d like to be part of this stand and represent the club, please fill out the form.

PS: Deadline to fill the form is for tomorrow at 1 PM.

Good luck and we hope to see you there!
Cultural Center · P3X3+6XV, El Mouradia, Algeria
★★★★☆ · Cultural center
Stand form
This is a form you can fill out if you're interested in representing Micro Club at a stand for an event dedicated to new baccalaureate students. DATE: 23th and 24th of July from 9:30AM to 2PM Place: https://maps.app.goo.gl/ZeJdCv7SuonBxReaA

Chems 22/07/2025 13:32

Salam @MC BOUNADEM

Hope you're doing well and enjoying your vacation! We’d like to inform you of an important update regarding the Cross Department process. To ensure a more efficient and flexible system, a new approach will now be implemented:

How It Works:

  • A form will be opened once or twice a year depending on the club’s activity.
  • Any member interested in joining another department must fill out a form during the open period.
  • Your application will then be reviewed by the HR team along with the leads of the concerned departments.

Important Notes:

  • Cross department requests will no longer be handled via ticket.
  • Members who already submitted a ticket will receive a response directly in their existing ticket.
  • The Honorable Mention ( aka HM) will not be considered the main or only criterion and other evaluation criteria will apply. This new system will allow us to handle requests more clearly and consistently.
If you have any questions, feel free to ask them in https://discord.com/channels/1282095800079351851/1296206726848188496 or by opening a tickey https://discord.com/channels/1282095800079351851/1294727254579871744 Thank you for your understanding and cooperation. Take caaaare ^^ (edited)

@MC BOUNADEM # MC has been hacked Everyone saw the message Chaos took over the local Whatever happened… wasn’t random Something was planted

And now... we need YOU

GHCTF – Green Hat CTF 2.0 is BACK

29, 30 and 31 July 2025 Maison de jeunes Slimane Belghit, Ouled Fayet location Are you ready to join the mission, decode the clues, and outsmart the system? This challenge isn’t just about hacking It’s about defending MC and discovering who’s behind all the mess

The mission is now OPEN!!

Ready to take on GHCTF 2.0? Just register you and your team now (4 members per team). Please we are tight on time, note that you have 24 hours to register, hurry up

Don’t have a team?

No worries! Join our team-building room and find your crew https://discord.com/channels/1282095800079351851/1313921711770435584

This is your moment!! The mission has started

Registration link: Register More details coming soon in our general meeting – stay tuned. Special thanks to the amazing @GHCTF 2.0 team for making this possible And to @deleted-role for the killer visuals that set the tone! (edited)
Home Young Slimane Belghit · Ouled Fayet, Algeria
★★★★★ · Youth organization

URGENT: GENERAL MEETING – MC HAS BEEN ATTACKED (AGAIN)

Hey again @MC BOUNADEM , no time left… MC is under attack Your mission has begun But before you step into the field, You need to know your enemy, Get your briefing, And learn how to enter the mission properly

Join us for a classified mission briefing

TONIGHT at 9PM — right here on Discord.

We’ll cover:
  • What the GHCTF is
  • Tools and skills you’ll need
    • Types of challenges you’ll face in the field
    • How to join a squad or build your own
    • And we’ll answer all your questions, agent-to-agent
    General Meeting Location: Discord Voice Channel
Secure Access Point: General meeting You’ve seen the signs. You’ve felt the tension. Now it’s time to get ready. ### GHCTF 2.0 Begins... We need YOU on the inside

MahdiDbh 28/07/2025 05:26
@MC BOUNADEM

IMPORTANT UPDATE: MISSION DATE SHIFTED

The system’s evolving, and so is the timeline!! New Operation Window: 31 July – 1 & 2 August 2025 Yep!! we heard you, It’s on the weekend, just like you asked ardaw 3lina berk Registration Extended: You now have 24 more hours to join!

Missed the deadline? You’ve got another shot!

Registered but you can’t come for the weekend or you already filled the form but have an issue ? please inform the RH team ASAP!

Don't Mind...

Don't know nothing about cybersecurity but you’re curious to discover it? You always wanted to learn it but keep postponing? this is your chance. Trust me, this might be your last real chance this year to learn while you’re free during the holidays and the weekend. If you waste it, you might never learn it at all. Already have some skills? Want to push further? This mission is for you too!

The mission continues...

You’ve got more time to prepare, gather your crew, and level up.

Chaos doesn’t wait. Neither should you

Registration Form!!

! Amine ta3 MCC 17/08/2025 13:23
Hello @MC BOUNADEM, hope you’re doing well ! nchallah tkono jewezto de bonnes vacances w tkono ready for this next year We usually don’t make a big announcements for this kind of things, w probably it will be the last time tesra but I wanted to take a moment to share something with you: Me and @Haku are officially stepping down from our role as Lead of @Internal Relations & Human Resources It has truly been an honor to serve as HR member last year, and HR leader this year I’ve learned a lot, met amazing people, made amazing friends and had the chance to work alongside incredible teammates lewezt 4 years in this club (and sadly not 5) developing myself and learning for the best And since this will be officially my last announcement of the club, i want to tell you some things During these 2 years as HR kayen bezaf nas 3erfoni 7eboni (c'est réciproque) w fehmoni Kayen also nas ze3fo probably 3liya for doing my job as HR, or meme hors HR just srat miscommunication w ze3fo, i want to tell you beli y a rien de personnel everything i did is for the club kima t9ol @Lyndas1y, we9t lkhedma khedma, w we9t l personnel w tmeskhir netmesekhro tsema i hope i'm leaving on good terms with everyone I just want to say thank you for everything, for the fun, the chaos, and the memories Almohim wach kont 7ayeb n9ol ... eh i’m not disappearing (mazal ma tbekhertch). I’ll still be sticking around as an RH member (even tho maranich mtewel) The good news is that: we now have new leads stepping in, and I’m confident they’ll do an amazing job From now on, if you need anything or have suggestions, you can reach out directly to them
  • @Rania Trache as HR lead
  • @seryne as HR assist
Rakom te3erfohom bien je penses Mena ou jay you have a new representatives ta3 IR. They will continue deliver their best comme tjr -# Tsema stop spamming me f DMs doka That’s all from me. Thank you all for the trust, the laughs and the memories

! Amine ta3 MCC
Hello @MC BOUNADEM, hope you’re doing well ! nchallah tkono jewezto de bonnes vacances w tkono ready for this next year We usually don’t make a big announcements for this kind of things, w probably it will be the last time tesra but I wanted to take a moment to share something with you: Me and @Haku are officially stepping down from our role as Lead of @Internal Relations & Human Resources It has truly been an honor to serve as HR member last year, and HR leader this year I’ve learned a lot, met amazing people, made amazing friends and had the chance to work alongside incredible teammates lewezt 4 years in this club (and sadly not 5) developing myself and learning for the best And since this will be officially my last announcement of the club, i want to tell you some things During these 2 years as HR kayen bezaf nas 3erfoni 7eboni (c'est réciproque) w fehmoni Kayen also nas ze3fo probably 3liya for doing my job as HR, or meme hors HR just srat miscommunication w ze3fo, i want to tell you beli y a rien de personnel everything i did is for the club kima t9ol @Lyndas1y, we9t lkhedma khedma, w we9t l personnel w tmeskhir netmesekhro tsema i hope i'm leaving on good terms with everyone I just want to say thank you for everything, for the fun, the chaos, and the memories Almohim wach kont 7ayeb n9ol ... eh i’m not disappearing (mazal ma tbekhertch). I’ll still be sticking around as an RH member (even tho maranich mtewel) The good news is that: we now have new leads stepping in, and I’m confident they’ll do an amazing job From now on, if you need anything or have suggestions, you can reach out directly to them
  • @Rania Trache as HR lead
  • @seryne as HR assist
Rakom te3erfohom bien je penses Mena ou jay you have a new representatives ta3 IR. They will continue deliver their best comme tjr -# Tsema stop spamming me f DMs doka That’s all from me. Thank you all for the trust, the laughs and the memories
MeyMeyy 17/08/2025 13:25
Reagiwlo MCC
18
Nassim.Hs 20/08/2025 10:24
Hey @MC BOUNADEM , July was a slightly calm month, with projects still moving in different sections and MCC keeping up its workshops and activities. And at the end, we closed it all with the big highlight: GHCTF 2.0 No long intro this time. Let’s get straight to the point. July’s Member of the Month is:

Rafik Djerdi @RAFIX

for his huge effort, both during the preparation phase and IRL at GHCTF 2.0 And of course, honorable mentions go to those who also left their mark this month:
  • From OPS: BOUMESBAH yasser @! ressay & AOUINA Moncef @! moncef_an
  • From Relex: SAIDI Nazim Mohamed @! nazim s & Dioubi Issam @!𝐬𝐬
  • From Design:AKNOUCHE SOUHA CHAIMA @chaima akn & Nahla Khettaoui @Nahla
  • From Multimedia: Reggaz fazil aimen omar @FAZIL & GHERNOUG Mohamed Anis @z3terminator r
  • From Communication: Tiliouine mehdi @!MehdiTln
  • From Marketing: BENTOURI Hasnaa @Hasnaa ✨
  • From Development: wail bentafat @chachawi
  • From IT: Hadj Yahia Nesrine @Nesrine
  • From GameDev: DERRAHI Mohamed @Toccata
  • From Robotics: Iknoun wissam @OuiOui
  • From IR-RH: CHERCHALI Mohamed Walid @Walidozich
That’s it for July, thanks to everyone for the effort.

Hello Chabiba @MC BOUNADEM

I hope you are doing well and jowazto a great vacation . As you know the club has been on a short break and things have been calm this past month. This break was well deserved after all the activities and the hard work we put in during the season. And now i guess l7a9 lwa9t wela wach 9alo @Executive Members We have a lot of things to share with you and a simple announcement won’t be enough. That’s why I’m calling you for a ## General Meeting This Friday, September 5th, 2025 at 9:30 PM. We’ll discuss a very important upcoming period for the club and for you as well. Your presence is mandatory, and we need everyone there. Please don’t miss this meeting! Until then take care and see you in the meeting inshallah. BYEEE ^^ https://discord.com/events/1282095800079351851/1412894794497396797 (edited)
