15
! itsDjinane 15/09/2025 10:35

Hello @MC BOUNADEM

The next chapter of elections is here! Here are the accepted candidates for this season :

Choose your fighter!

For the PRESIDENT position

  • Cherchali Mohamed Walid @Walidozich
  • SAIDI Mohamed Rostom @arixstoo # For the VICE-PRESIDENT position
  • Yahiaoui Abderrahmane @Abderrahmane.ts
  • Belhocine Rayan @!! justLeR # For the SG position :
  • FERRANI ASSIA LYNA @! AssiaLyna None for the SGA position, but will indeed be filled as we progress through the elections! Now, since we have a bigger pool than previous years, the agenda is vastly different! Rather than going through all presentations then voting at once, we'll hold presentations for each position then vote for it, because as you may know, those who do not win a certain position, may apply to the next one! 🫡
This means that there will be one day for voting between each presentations for a position! Ex: P presentations, one day of voting, VP presentations, one day of voting...etc
More information soon! And so, I'm happy to announce that the hunger games start tomorrow! Looking for fun? A debate? A vision and a serious discussion about MC's future?

Join us tomorrow at 8pm to listen to Walid and Rostom going for the President position!

Be sure to check the documents to have a deeper understanding of each candidate, and see you tomorrow! 🫶

! itsDjinane

Hello @MC BOUNADEM

The next chapter of elections is here! Here are the accepted candidates for this season :

Choose your fighter!

For the PRESIDENT position

  • Cherchali Mohamed Walid @Walidozich
  • SAIDI Mohamed Rostom @arixstoo # For the VICE-PRESIDENT position
  • Yahiaoui Abderrahmane @Abderrahmane.ts
  • Belhocine Rayan @!! justLeR # For the SG position :
  • FERRANI ASSIA LYNA @! AssiaLyna None for the SGA position, but will indeed be filled as we progress through the elections! Now, since we have a bigger pool than previous years, the agenda is vastly different! Rather than going through all presentations then voting at once, we'll hold presentations for each position then vote for it, because as you may know, those who do not win a certain position, may apply to the next one! 🫡
This means that there will be one day for voting between each presentations for a position! Ex: P presentations, one day of voting, VP presentations, one day of voting...etc
More information soon! And so, I'm happy to announce that the hunger games start tomorrow! Looking for fun? A debate? A vision and a serious discussion about MC's future?

Join us tomorrow at 8pm to listen to Walid and Rostom going for the President position!

Be sure to check the documents to have a deeper understanding of each candidate, and see you tomorrow! 🫶

Helloooo @MC BOUNADEM Now that MC labs finally redha 3lina we're happy to announce that finally :

Voting for the President is now open for the next 24 hours!

  • Go through this link http://microlabs.microclub.info/signin .
  • Enter with your Discord account (must be a member of this server to be elligible to vote).
  • Find the Elections section, you'll be shown the candidates, their documents (for good measure) and the option to vote.
Be sure about where your vote goes, it does matter, you have a direct hand in the future of the club now! 🫵 Voting closes tomorrow at 2.20pm and results will be announced soon after! aya demo9ratiya khawti, get to work! 🫡

Vice-President presentations are set tomorrow at 8.30pm!

! Farid 19/09/2025 04:34
السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

Hi @MC BOUNADEM

I would like to inform you that the elections are postponed, and instead we will hold a general meeting today at 9:00 PM. Being in an executive position is not just about titles or roles. It means taking actions and making decisions that directly affect the club, and it is not something to be taken lightly. That is why we are four in the @Executive Members but not four alone. We also rely on those who always support the club and gives us advices. As Allah says: "وَأَمْرُهُمْ شُورَىٰ بَيْنَهُمْ" This type of meeting is very important because each one of you needs to receive Updates and clarifications and understand the consequences of the decisions being made (manghatoch chems bel gharbal) and the importance of this event. That is why we expect everyone who cares about this club to attend. Attendance is mandatory.

2
Chems 20/09/2025 06:07

Salam Alikom @MC BOUNADEM

I hope you are doing well. First of all thank you for being present during this critical period and situation. We really appreciate your support and understanding. Thanks as well to everyone who attended the meeting, seeing so many members there shows how much you still care about the club 🫶 . Here’s a short recap of what we discussed in our general meeting yesterday:
  • Due to valid reasons and certain behaviors from the two candidates who applied for the President position (which went against the Code of Conduct), we had to make a critical decision: both candidates have been disqualified from the election. As executive members, we cannot tolerate such behavior within the club.
  • The application form for executive board positions will be open again, not only for the President position but also for other roles. This gives a chance to those who may have changed their mind after recent events and now wish to take a position on the board. ### Here is the link to the form.
The form will close on 23/09/2025 at 2 PM, and we will share the updated election agenda with you afterwards.

Reminder of the conditions to apply:

  • You must have a clean record.
  • For the President and Vice President positions, you must be part of Faculté d'infomatique.
  • You must have at least 1 year of membership in the club. To conclude, everything happens for a reason, and as I always say: better now than later. Thank you all once again.
Have a great day!
MC Election 2025-2026
This form will be for people who want to be an executive member for the next season 2025-2026
51
7
8
3
! itsDjinane 22/09/2025 09:42
Hello @MC BOUNADEM

This is your reminder that the deadline to apply for executive board candidancy is less than 24 hours away!

The form closes at 2pm and not midnight ! Careful there. I'd like to also remind you that the @Executive Members are here to help with preparing you : Whether you need help refining your document, advice, got a few questions about the job itself, or how the past season went. Even if you need help with your slides or in need ndirolk simulation and questions! Seriously, it is our duty to support candidates and ensure the elections run smoother than they did so far. Seriously, you need only reach out through DMs! I'll remind you that the special circumstances of these elections have allowed you few privileges, take an opportunity when you see it! And a personal advice if you're still wondering and questioning : make decisions from a place of ambition and need for growth than a placeof fear, the source of the "why" matters here, be sure it's the right source. C'est tout, take care, and see you again once the new rounds of presentations and debates start!

Salam Alikom @MC BOUNADEM

I hope you are doing well. First of all thank you for being present during this critical period and situation. We really appreciate your support and understanding. Thanks as well to everyone who attended the meeting, seeing so many members there shows how much you still care about the club 🫶 . Here’s a short recap of what we discussed in our general meeting yesterday:
  • Due to valid reasons and certain behaviors from the two candidates who applied for the President position (which went against the Code of Conduct), we had to make a critical decision: both candidates have been disqualified from the election. As executive members, we cannot tolerate such behavior within the club.
  • The application form for executive board positions will be open again, not only for the President position but also for other roles. This gives a chance to those who may have changed their mind after recent events and now wish to take a position on the board. ### Here is the link to the form.
The form will close on 23/09/2025 at 2 PM, and we will share the updated election agenda with you afterwards.

Reminder of the conditions to apply:

  • You must have a clean record.
  • For the President and Vice President positions, you must be part of Faculté d'infomatique.
  • You must have at least 1 year of membership in the club. To conclude, everything happens for a reason, and as I always say: better now than later. Thank you all once again.
Have a great day!

Chems 25/09/2025 15:04

Salam Alikom @MC BOUNADEM

Hope you are doing well. (sorry for the late announcement) Since l'année universitaire a commancé, we wish you a year full of success. And for those who are in their final year (like me ), enjoy it and make great memories. Rabi ywafaqkom inshallah. Now that the elections have been postponed, it is time to move forward. In MC Labs, you will find all the candidates who applied for different positions. Par contre this time there are a few changes in the timing of the presentations: each candidate will have 15 minutes to present. We will share the final election agenda tomorrow inshallah. More details will also be explained in the first presentation meeting. ## The first presentation for the President position will be held tomorrow, 26/09/2025 at 8:30 PM. Your presence is very important, because your vote will decide the next president. Until then, see you tomorrow inshallah. Have a great night! (edited)

Chems 01/10/2025 05:30

Salam alikom @MC BOUNADEM

After what happened in the club, I don’t know if you’re doing well or not, but I hope you’re doing better at least. First We are glad to announce that ## Our Deputy General Secretary for the season 2025-2026 will be @eyness ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ Voting Results:
  • Eyness: 47.02%
  • Ilyes: 21.19%
  • Elhadi: 19.87%
  • Yesser: 11.92%
 Second, all of you are asking now why executive mabano 3lah mahdroch 3lah madaroch clarification. You guys hderto kaml wach habito, you made your judgment based on one point of view, from one side. Now it’s our turn to speak, provide our clarification and make everything clear for you and for all the members who may have formed a negative image of the executive team and the people mentioned. To clarify, it will simply be our statement and clarification, our goal is to provide the transparency you seek. This will take place in a

General meeting this Friday at 8:30 PM, inshallah.

Your presence is required and attendance is mandatory. Good luck everyone!

! AssiaLyna 02/10/2025 01:30

Good morning @MC BOUNADEM ,

I hope you are all doing well. I'm here to announce a great opportunity for you: Micro Club has been invited to co-organize the 1st edition of FormaTech Expo (an innovative event that highlights training as a key driver of business transformation and technological progress). In addition, MC will have its own stand there.

Event details:

  • Location: SAFEX, Algiers, Pavillon A
  • Date: October 6 – 9, 2025
This is an important moment for us, especially during this period. It’s the right time to show that MC is still active and going strong.

Important notes:

  • Staff spots are limited for each day.
  • There may be a simulation day before the event.
  • Please double-check your availability.
If you want to participate as staff, fill out this

Form

For any questions, feel free to DM me. Let’s make the most of this opportunity.

Reminder: Don’t forget our General Meeting this Friday (tomorrow) at 8:30 PM. It’s very important for you as MC members to attend. Please make sure to be there MC needs its real members, its real supporters

Thank you and have a great day

Reminder: FormaTech Expo Staff Form

Hello @MC BOUNADEM , I’m here to share more details about the staff form for the FormaTech Expo, especially regarding the questions I’ve been receiving in DMs:

- Deadline: Saturday at 19:00 (the form will close after that).

- Shifts available:

Morning: 7h – 13h Afternoon: 12h – 18h
  • There might be a simulation day on Saturday (to be confirmed).
  • After the selection, the staff responsibles will contact you with all the details.
If you haven’t filled out the form yet, don’t miss this great opportunity:

Form

Micro Club 04/10/2025 03:59

Salam Alikom, my dear members @MC BOUNADEM

I am Micro Club, I came today to check on you and share a special announcement with you. First, I want to sincerely thank the former executives for their dedication. In all my 40 years, I have never seen such a successful year, full of events and achievements. I’m truly proud of my members, their hard work and the strong leadership that made it possible. Thank you @! Farid @! itsDjinane @Chems and @! عبد العالي for this amazing year. I wish you all the best in your future journeys, and know that I will never forget your era and what you have given to me. Now, it is time for a new chapter with new leaders who want to give even more, and who want to keep me always at the top.

03:59
  • Let’s start with the one who will represent me externally and speak in my name, a dedicated member from the External Relations Department who served the club all year. An engineering student who now takes the President position. @!! justLeR , I trust you to achieve great things.
  • For the Vice President position, we have one of the best IT members, a wise leader who guided the technical side of the club. A cybersecurity student who will carry this title with honor yes i'm talking about @Abderrahmane.ts ,
  • For the Secretary General, I’m glad to welcome @! AssiaLyna ,another MIV student on the board. I’m truly happy to have her with us. A special person in my family, kind with everyone and always keeping her smile even in the hardest moments. I’m sure she will bring great things to me and to all my members.
  • And finally, saving the best for last, for the Deputy Secretary General position we have @eyness ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ another enginner student, an energetic marketer, full of initiative and proved herself many times throughout the year.

!! justLeR 06/10/2025 13:35
@MC BOUNADEM

Dear Micro Club, السلام عليكم و رحمة الله و بركاته

I want to start my first announcement by thanking you for your trust, then your support which projected me to the position I’m talking from today. In a second place, before starting this new season, I pray Allah to give me the strength, energy, and intelligence to achieve my vision and make MC a better and bigger club, and the community a better and safer place. I also want to congratulate the new executives and my new team, @Abderrahmane.ts , @! AssiaLyna , and @eyness ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ I’ve worked with them all before, and after our recent discussions as a bureau, I can confidently say this: this team is one of the most balanced I could have imagined. Each one of us brings something, our fields of specialty, interests, and personalities complete each other perfectly. One is a beast in internal matters, another is a strategist comme j’en ai jamais rencontré, some are calm enough to turn off a storm, others chase the impossible and push everyone to dream bigger -simply the perfect balance -. Talking about the problems and polemics that recently happened, I want to point out that it is an old bureau’s matter, and whether a part is right or wrong shouldn’t affect our club, our members, or our workflow. Everyone has a different view on the matter and thinks differently. This is why we shouldn’t hate on each other or boycott each other just because we don’t stand on the same opinion.
102
9
14
7
10
10
3
1
13:35
So please, we are here to make the club a better place (kima 9ali sahbi who is also a president, “Dawlat Micro Club”), bring better opportunities, and level it up to the next level. But this will never happen without the efforts, intelligence, and dedication our members put in. I have a philosophy that I go by every day: “Always see the best.” Take this situation as an opportunity to learn how to shift your focus to your real goals when distractions are fighting for your attention. So, as executives and in the name of all four of us, the only thing about what happened recently is what we learned from it - and many initiatives and changes are going to be applied to, as I said and as we should all say, make this club a better one… maybe the best (who said we aren’t already?). It was a relief to me today when I saw people working hard in Formatech. I also discovered a lot of new faces, listened to a lot of members, and the fact that they’re hyped about their projects, their future plans within the club, and how serious and professional yet fun they are - it’s very heartwarming and a needed push for us (yes, we’re grinding even tho mzal mabdina xD). Anyway, I think twalt bzf, thank you for your trust once again. We are here for the club. The club is its members, so we are here for you. If anything - and I mean anything - don’t hesitate to slide into our DMs, we’re all ears. reminder: the local will closed tommorow from 13h till the end of the day. (quick note: people li ykono f la fac, le club ta3 lmousala (mosque) ta3 la fac are organizing حملة نظافة within our university and looking for visibitlity, it lasts only 1h30, so if you are willing to help, here is the link @MC BOUNADEM (edited)

uranium 15/10/2025 13:56
@MC BOUNADEM I hope you are doing well at this hour , soheib here to announce important changes and clarify some points we keep getting asked :
  • The first and major change of the cancelation of tommorows workshop ,
thus the first workshop will be saturday's instead. We appologies for the inconvenience our dear mentor had unplanned circumstances. This is super unfortunate for all of us but was nessecary to maintain the quality of the workshops to exceed our members expectations to wait till the second scheduled date.
  • and to clarify and reassure you all :
  • the workshop is open to all members , the form is a datagatheting forms that is meant especially for external (out of usthb) members to get access into the university and to acess the attendence so we can accommodate everybody🫶
  • Last thing i would like everyone that has yet to download the software to do so before saturday and if you face any issues to come to me or tag me.
We will soon send the updated workshop schedule, keep your eyes open (edited)

Conference (open to all MC and non-MC members): Tuesday, 21 October Cyber Space – USTHB 13:00 Ready to represent the club and make an impact? Fill out the form below and join the team! https://forms.gle/KsXXJE5AoYcPMeNk6

(Wassim) 21/10/2025 10:00

DEV Departement | State Management Workshop

YAAAA @MC BOUNADEM

Every React app no matter how simple relies on one key concept: State Management. This workshop will help you understand how data flows in React and how to manage it efficiently across your components. Join us for another hands-on session from our Dev Workshops series, where you’ll learn: How to handle and share state effectively in real-world scenarios Common patterns and best practices for clean, scalable React apps Live examples and interactive exercises! When: Tomorrow, from 13:30 until the end of the day Where: The local of MC We know many of you are used to working in the local, but this time, it’s the Dev Department’s turn! The local will be reserved for the Dev Department tomorrow for this workshop. We apologize for any inconvenience and thank you for your understanding. If you’d like to join us, you can register here
State Management Workshop
Learn how to efficiently manage data and interactions in modern web apps using React JS. Date: This Wednesday 22/10 (Tomorrow) Time: 1:30 PM Location: MC's local By: Adel HADJ ARAB

!! justLeR 26/10/2025 12:52
السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته @MC BOUNADEM I hope you are all doing well, and everything is going well As u know, MC has recently gone through a transition phase where u, the members, chose us as a new bureau to lead this beautiful club. We want to thank each one of u for your trust and inshallah, we will honor this responsibility and give our best for MC until the very end. To finalize things on the administrative side, we will hold our General Assembly (AG), during which u will confirm the president and bureau members through a vote.

Date: Tomorrow, Monday 27 Oct

Time: 10:30 AM

Location: La salle li mour la poste ( fel Village)

Your presence is very important. This won’t take much time, but ur vote is ur voice, and we truly count on all of u to be there and make things official. As MC members, it’s not only ur right, it’s ur role in building the future of this club. We trust you , and we know that MC members always stand for their club. You’ve already seen the work we started and the energy we are putting into planning and organizing for MC. With ur support, we can continue moving forward stronger and more united than ever. Let’s show tomorrow that MC stands together.

one team, one family.

Nteklo ealikom See you tomorrow inshallah at 10:30am Until then, take care and have a great night!

Yousra 27/10/2025 09:30
@MC BOUNADEM

SALAM EL CHABIBA !

Hope you’re all doing great! I’m thrilled to share some news you’ve been waiting for : Registrations for PINKTOBER are now officially open! PINKTOBER is this month’s highlight event, dedicated to the Pink October awareness cause Here’s what you need to know :
  • It’s a three-day Datathon (72 hours) of teamwork, learning, and challenge .
  • The event will be held entirely online, from October 30th to November 1st .
  • The challenge is open to teams of exactly 4 members ready to put their data skills to work ! Whether you’re a beginner or more advanced, don’t hesitate to take on this new challenge , it’ll be an amazing experience for you, incha’Allah!
Registration link P.S. Hurry up! Registrations won’t stay open for long , so make sure to sign up in time for this exciting adventure! If you don’t have a team yet, you can find one here: https://discordapp.com/channels/1282095800079351851/1313921711770435584 Fi aman Allah!

Holà chabiba zina

-# @MC BOUNADEM I hope you all are doing just amazing!

Another Exciting Collab

Micro Club is invited to collaborate at the TechWomen event , organized by MecaClub to celebrate women’s achievements in tech and industry through talks, stands, and workshops, which will be held at the USTHB Auditorium this Thursday, October 30th.
  • We’re joining this unique event as Staff organizers, and you can be part of the team too!
Just fill out the TECHWomen Staff Form and join us
  • the form will close by midnight and the tasks will be launched tomorrow inshaallah
-# small note : even men can fill the form and be part of this event's success ... so don't hesitate Have a wonderful day and once again, nteklo ealikom to do your best in the event as if it were MC’s own, CHOUKRAN
TECHWomen 2025 Staff
TechWomen, an event organized by MecaClub, is a unique opportunity to celebrate women’s achievements in the field of technology. Micro Club will be the co-organizer of the event, which will take place on October 30th, at the USTHB Auditorium. Please make sure of your availability before filling out the form.

Hadil 02/11/2025 14:34

MSRC is baaack!!

Hello there, @MC BOUNADEM ! Bet you already guessed it, huh? x))) That’s right, registrations for MSRC are officially OPEN MSRC 2.0 is the second edition of the Micro Solid Robotic Camp, an internal robotics-oriented 3D CAD and mechanics competition, where participants compete to create the best design across multiple themes and take on a series of thrilling engineering challenges! Still hesitating? Remember : you only miss the shots you don’t take. Absolutely beginner-friendly, go for it! Click here to participate: https://forms.gle/uYwUTvHvaBK3wwR28 Registrations will close in 24 hours Not into robotics? The staff form is open too! get behind the scenes and look at how it all works! 🫡 Apply to be Staff : https://forms.gle/sH7JQPfbs5WG2U7y9 form will close in 24 hours Gear up, team up, and get ready to make history at MSRC 2.0. The arena awaits. PS: Please note that you can not be staff and participate at the same time and vice versa, thank you for understanding
MSRC 2.0 Participation Form
Beginner or Expert? Member of the robotics section or not? You’re welcomed to join MSRC, an immersive and collaborative experience focused on 3D modelling with SolidWorks. where creativity meets mechanics! 🗓 06–08 November 2025 Location: To be announced 4 to 5 members per team
MSRC 2.0 Staff Registration
MSRC Is an internal bootcamp happening from the 06th of November to the 08th. Note: If the event is not held at USTHB, transportation will not be provided.

Hadil 03/11/2025 10:57

HEY @MC BOUNADEM ️

Are you ready to unlock the ultimate SolidWorks skills? This isn’t just another workshop… it’s the third and most exciting session yet! We’re taking you beyond the basics, exploring advanced modeling, clever shortcuts, and pro-level tips that will make your designs truly stand out . If you thought the last session was cool, get ready… this one is next-level serious fun! Date: Tuesday 04 November Time: 1:00 PM Place: https://maps.app.goo.gl/o2Jy4DPaNj2HKyur5?g_st=ipc Whether you’ve been with us from the start or are just curious, this session is packed with hands-on practice, real-world tricks, and all the guidance you need to shine . Don’t miss it—your next-level SolidWorks self will thank you!
Centre Culturel Mohamed Aïssa Messaoudi · Hussein Dey

Nassim.Hs 04/11/2025 23:28
Important Update Hey @MC BOUNADEM ! First, we’d like to apologize for the late announcement of the event venue, thank you all for your patience and understanding! As soheib mentioned: The official venue is confirmed: Maison de Jeunes Abderrahmane LAALA Sleep-over confirmed! That means staff shifts have been updated:
  • Day Shift: 7h – 17h
  • Night Shift: 16h – 7h
All members who wish to join as staff must fill out the new staff form, even if you’ve already submitted the previous one. Fill out the staff form here Please note: Food will not be provided for staff members. Staff selection starts today at 18h! Anyone who wishes to attend as staff, especially for Thursday, 6 November, should fill out the form as soon as possible. For participants:
  • If you have any issues or concerns, feel free to DM an HR member, we’ll be happy to assist you.
  • The registration form is still open for anyone who wants to participate in this event!:
Participant form Important for everyone coming (participant or staff): Everyone needs to register again at Maison de Jeunes, even those who registered last year. Please bring:
  • 1 photo
  • Birth certificate (extrait de naissance)
  • Photocopy of your ID card (carte d’identité)
  • 200 DA: To be paid via CCP or BaridiMob, the account number will be shared soon.
Otherwise, you will not be allowed to enter! Thanks again for your cooperation.

Rania Trache 12/11/2025 12:07
Hey @MC BOUNADEM, It’s been a while since we made this kind of announcement, but we are back for the rest of the season ! Each month, we take a moment to recognize the most hardworking, talented, and dedicated members of our club. It’s our way to motivate you and encourage everyone to push their limits This October was packed with amazing events, and without further delay, let’s announce our Members of the Month

October’s Members of the Month are...

@Nassim.Hs HESSAS Nassim and @el grande lina tagamedavit Lina Haddad A huge thank you to both of them for their outstanding efforts and their ability to handle pressure like pros And of course, some honorable mentions go to those who also made an impact this month: OPS : @!!Watson DERBIL MERIEM COMMUNICATION : @Saraa SAADOUNE Sara DEVLOPMENT : @!dris._.mkl MEKBAL Idris RELEX : @Aminoss Cherfaoui Mohamed Amine MULTIMEDIA: @ADEMO Derradji adem DESIGN : @سارة Sarah Laoudi & @نسرين Nesrine Dekkiche MARKETING: @ميليساااا ؟ Melissa Nafa ROBOTICS : @hiicheem OMARI MOHAMED HICHEM IT : @¬ nawel BELLIL Nawel HR: @! Redha ta3 MCC Bouras mohamed redha & @Yousra DADDI ADDOUN Yousra And finally, a huge shoutout to our Design Managers, who worked incredibly hard these past few days to deliver a perfect result for the National Hackathon Thank you @el grande lyna aissat lyna & @el grande nadjet Salhi Nadjet & @NOT NEZUKO🌸✨ Benouaklil Chérifa Ikram & @el grande abdou Abderaouf Benamirouche for your amazing work and dedication (edited)

(Wassim) 26/11/2025 06:17

@MC BOUNADEM Workshop Announcement

Laravel Backend Workshop

Many exciting projects are coming — and a lot of them will need solid backend work. To prepare for that, we’re diving into Laravel, one of the most productive and widely used PHP frameworks for building modern APIs and backend systems. We’ll kick things off with an IRL Laravel Workshop, where we’ll cover the essentials. This will be followed by practical sessions and a Live Project that we’ll build together, step by step. This is a golden opportunity to learn Laravel the practical way and strengthen your backend foundations for upcoming MC projects.

Start by attending the first Workshop led by the one and only: @! وائلہ

For the others Local will be closed i guess.

When: Thursday at 13:30 in the local (Tomorrow) Register here: Workshop Form (edited)
Laravel Workshop

! AssiaLyna 02/12/2025 13:38

Ideathon Staff Applications Are Now Open!

Hello there, @MC BOUNADEM Want to be part of the success of the Ideathon and join us during the IRL phase? We’re excited to announce that staff applications for the Ideathon are officially open!

Apply here

Event Details

  • Dates: 07, 08, and 09 December
  • Location: Cyber Space – USTHB
Please make sure you’re fully available before filling out the form. Important: If you study outside USTHB, you must fill in your NIN (National ID Number / Numéro d’Identité National) in the form. The form will close Friday night, so don’t miss your chance! If you’re a new member and want to be part of the staff team, don’t hesitate, this might be your opportunity! We can’t wait to see what you’ll bring to the event
Ideathon staff 25/26
The event will take place on Sunday, December 07, Monday, December 08, and Tueseday, December 09 in the Cyber Espace - USTHB.

HEYYY @MC BOUNADEM ,

(first time using this tag and not the last time j'espère)

Hope y'all are doing great,

3dna annonce TRES TRES importante pour vous

It's time to update our members database every year m3a debut ta3 chaque season lazem ndiro this update to keep track of this HUGE amount of motivated people, et en même temps nefroha m3a l'administration and ofc en tant que club we need your informations to better serve you. It's also finally time to select YOUR SECTION *for @New Weavers
  • or to switch section for old members, during this 25/26 season
So make sure to fill this form by clicking here. Notes:

- This form is mandatory :

  • Li ma y3emerch had l form before the deadline, we will not consider him as member anymore, and will be KICKED
  • It's essential to choose a section, even if you're an old member or an alumni, You MUST fill out this form to confirm your section and membership, or you risk being KICKED out from the club.
  • if you have any questions about the form don't hesitate to ask, in dms or in #📩open-ticket or you'll be KICKED (jk this time )

    DEADLINE: 27/12/2025 14:59 ... sans exceptions.

and have a good night

3imed 14/12/2025 12:01

SALLAAAAM CHABIBA @MC BOUNADEM

j'espere que vous allez tous tres bien,

we have another thing to announce lyoum it's time to announce.....

THE MEMBER OF THE MONTH

so for the @New Weavers voici une petite explication: each month we announce one of most actif member during this last month i weli 3ndo titre ta3 Member of the month w y9dr i dir cross role (joining two departments) tout ça bch n'motivokom chwya Ce mois de novembre a été très chargé pour le club, que ce soit au niveau des events : MSRC 2.0, Algeria 2.0,Ideathon, etc. W kan kayen aussi l’Ice Break, le Welcome Week, et plein d’autres stands. And now, it’s time to thank the members li kano les plus actifs et qui ont tout donné pour la réussite de tous ça.

November's MoM isssssss @Hichem🐀

Que ce soit en temps ou en énergie, Hichem a tant donné pour le club ce mois-ci. He did a great job as a representative and staff responsible of MSRC 2.0 and Algeria 2.0, and by assisting and working on all MC events held this month as Logistics Team Responsible. So ya3tik sa7a, and thank you so much 🫡 well deserved w makach mom announcement without our Honorable Mentions from all the dep/section : From @IT: @slimane_evrywr From @Game Dev : @S A N O & @Toccata From @Robotics: @Ryma✨ From @Logistics & Events Management: @Meryouma 🤍 & @Ghada henni From @Design: @ibti& @حناون del IT From @Marketing : @Sabrinel ♡ & @I K R A M From @Communication: @Yasmine & @MARY 🤙🏼 From @External Relations : @Hannah From @Multimedia: @Mohand & @ihssene From @Development : @Asma Soltani Great job everyone ! I hope this will motivate you to keep working ! Also j'espere que ca motive les autres tan bach yekhedmo bach tkono ntoma nchallah next MoM 🫵 CONGRATULATIONS for y'all (edited)

JOIN US IN THE @Game Dev ART GALLERY @MC BOUNADEM

You are more than welcomed to join us TOMORROW FROM 10 AM TO 2:30 PM for the 1st Game dev ART GALLERY We will be showcasing the work of our member during the last month in THE FALLEN BOOTCAMP Can't wait to see you all there!! *Before leaving make sure to vote for your best member!! * THE HQ WILL BE CLOSED TILL 10! THANK YOU FOR YOUR UNDERSTANDING ^^

!! justLeR 17/12/2025 13:02
Salam ealaykom @MC BOUNADEM This is a very important announcement, everyone is asked to read it very carefully as i am going to adress serious sensitive matters

First point and the most important one,

We are receiving these days complaints about harassment cases, people going beyond the work boundaries and violating the personnel space of other members, boys having Intrusive behavior toward girls.. So i want to be as clear as possible now saying that these matters These matters are treated with the most seriousness here. if it ever happened and we reached to you after comfirming your involvment in such matters , we won't be there to discuss but to punish, and that might result in a direct ban in case we had already talked to you about it (when i say we, i mean any responsible in the club, executive, HR, Lead…) or in case we judged that you deserved it. And if we ever get into the scenario of threatening ppl bach maychkoch (tmenaci). If this happens we will take it to a level fo9 le club, et il y’aura des consequences bra le club, and by consequences i mean ones li wahed maytmnahom fl hayat (machi f la fac brk). I hope this is clear, if not here is a resumé, WE ARE NOT GOING TO LET ANY AND I SAY ANY CASE OF THIS TYPE SLIDE BY. (I encourage everyone yechki, choose anyone in the club that you trust, preferably HRs and executive but if you feel more comfortable with your leads or any lead, go to them, don’t stay without saying anything. and tickets are always here for you to report such matters) khawti we can’t oversee everything, we are about 1600 members as you know , and we can’t be everywhere and everytime. So please its our responsibility all ga3 kima rana as humans to do something (especially as Men), اضعف الايمان arwah achki, hadi ki mkach gae wch dir)
199
90
9
18
3
3
13:02

Now to keep going in the same spirit,

Khawti the respect for each others, it is crucial, the community of @MC BOUNADEM is a community of students, learners, muslims, we are la creme de la creme and we should act like it, here are some points that you need to know, and after this announcement we will start taking actions regarding this, القانون لا يحمي المغفلين
  • Respectez Votre language, 3esso mlih wach ykhroj mn lsankom, 3ess mlih wch thdr in front of people and in the server, avoid using words that could be percieved as vulgar or offending by some people ( no N word, no slurs in the chats ) , we are a scientific community, kayen l9der binatna, we all gotta respect that
  • Don’t use pictures of other people without their consent for any purpose, and don’t use them at all to make memes or make fun of them (with or without consent )
  • We are here to learn, work and grow, so we must have and care about those boundaries with each others ( surtout its mendatory within the club’s environment y3ni local, 9odam local, events….).
And So any behaviors that may reflect a personal relationship between you and another member are NOT allowed fel club, Any form of flirting or suggestive behavior is strictly prohibited in any club-related setting. and shall be addressed seriously if ever reported.. Lastly khwti.. we are here to grow, again we are 1600 members, and we need to set rules to ensure that everything goes smoothly, and this rules are part of the growth, so we count on you to respect them, and also help us making sure that they are respected Note that any case, ticket, chakwa from anyone is kept secret and anonymous ESPECIALLY if when asked for it, so please never ever hesitate to speak up to HRs or to the right persons, your experience in the club is our responsibility, we are working hard on it, so a little help from y’all would be very appreciated. (edited)

? عادل 18/12/2025 11:02

BUILD IT IS HERE!

Salam 3likom @MC BOUNADEM, I’m thrilled to announce our upcoming internal event: Build IT, a 5-day online technical event designed for those who want to go beyond surface-level building. Here, the goal is simple: understand the technology deeply, then prove it by building with it. This is not a typical hackathon. You won’t be judged only on what you build, but on how well you understand, explain, and implement the core concept behind it. The event is open to all members. For new members, it comes right after the Ideathon as a natural step into a more technical and hands-on experience. Tsema ida 7abin tstfado ghir ma tratiwch

Event Details

  • Duration: 5 Days (From 23 to 28 December)
  • Platform: Online (Discord)
  • Team Size: 4–5 members
  • Themes: Randomly assigned (protocols, algorithms, advanced concepts)

The Challenge

  • Research the assigned concept in depth
  • Document it clearly in a technical README.md file
  • Build a real website or application that demonstrates it

Registrations are open: REGISTER NOW!

Chi3arona:

“Ebniha ida kont rajel.”
Tsema if you really understand the tech. Hnaya tbynolna 9odoratkom

Ayaa with 2 A's 19/12/2025 08:54

FALLEN BOOTCAMP WINNERS

The battle is over… the dust has settled… and the legends have risen After weeks of grinding, creating, debugging, and casting pixel magic, it’s time to crown our champions ---

ARCHERS CAMP (3D ARTISTS)

Master of depth, light, and dimension WINNER: @AMINE Drop some in chat for this 3D legend! ---

WARRIORS CAMP (CODERS)

Fearless fighter of bugs and logic WINNER: @adlane / lano Absolute carry of the code battlefield! ---

SORCERERS CAMP (2D ARTISTS)

Caster of color, style, and vibes WINNER: @Sonic This art? Pure magic. ---

MEMBERS’ FAVORITE

Chosen by the people. Loved by all. WINNER: @Toccata 🥹 The community has spoken with 22 VOTES! --- BIG CONGRATS to all the winners! And massive respect to all @Game Dev members who participated This bootcamp wouldn’t be the same without your passion, effort, and creativity Stay tuned… because this is only the beginning # And @MC BOUNADEM Don't forget to fill the data gathering form above.

le crap 19/12/2025 12:34

Hello @MC BOUNADEM

Robotics Today: How It’s Evolving and Why It Matters We are excited to invite you to an exclusive online talk exploring the rapidly changing world of robotics! Move beyond science fiction and discover how these technologies are shaping our reality.
  • When Tomorrow, December 20th.
  • Time 20h30.
  • Where https://discord.com/channels/1282095800079351851/1292866106742014043
What we will cover:
  • The Evolution: Why is robotics advancing so fast right now?
  • Real-World Impact: From smart factories to life-saving medical robots.
  • The Future of Work: How AI and robotics are redefining jobs and skills.
  • Interactive Q&A: Get your questions answered live by our robotic @Expert team
We will also present the Robotics Division, our current projects, and how YOU can get involved! Don't miss out on this deep dive into the future. See you there!

PS : dont forget to fill the data gathering form :

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdd9RiEGX7FlmejqaAlt63ZgTY-9IEQL-iozmVly8f45LKrfA/viewform?usp=send_form (edited)

VISUAL CREW - ART GALLERY DAY

We are pleased to invite @MC BOUNADEM to attend the Visual Crew Art Gallery Day, showcasing creative works from our @Design and @Multimedia Departments. This exhibition features projects from the Competition, including Graphic Design, UI/UX Design, and Editing & Motion Design December 23rd, 2025 10:00 AM – 3:30 PM Cyber Space – USTHB

Important Notice:

  • Confirmation of attendance is mandatory , and is especially required for non-USTHB students to ensure proper access to the place.
  • Please confirm your attendance by completing the following form We would be honored by your presence, mrehba bikom # Reminder :
  • Only 6 days left for filling the Data gathering Form
Visual Crew Attendance
VISUAL CREW IS HERE! Visual Crew is an internal, collaborative individual competition jointly organized by the Design and Multimedia Departments. ! Redha ta3 MCC 24/12/2025 11:00
Hello @MC BOUNADEM , I hope y'all are doing well enjoying some rest and that your preparations for the upcoming exams are progressing smoothly. and so to support you during this period, I’m pleased to announce the start of the

revision sessions on the MCC server.

Now If you ever feel confident in any particular module / subject and would like to share your knowledge and help others, we vividly invite you to fill out the form below for the opportunity to host a revision session within our community server Your help in this can make a real difference, 9ader nass yesslek semestre dyalhom thanks to the informations you might share with them and the questions you might answer, so for those who might feel hesitant about it, think about d3awi lkhir li 9ader ydjokom men hadi. and remember, teaching others is also one of the best ways to strengthen your own understanding. - Revision period will be from this Saturday to next Saturday. more details are here in the form ps : don't forget to fill the data gathering li raho lfo9 khawti, w profitiw lmax men had les vaccances, time is precious nowdays.
Révision sessions - S1 25/26
If you're a little genius or you master a particular module and have a passion for sharing knowledge, then this opportunity is made for you! Note: the revision sessions will take place from December 27, 2025, to January 3 , 2025, at 7:30 PM, on the discord server. P.S : Please make sure you are available during the selected dates.

3imed 27/12/2025 12:55

Hey @MC BOUNADEM

Hope you're all doing great w rakom t'avanciw f les révisions. Although Today was supposed to be the deadline for the data gathering form, many of you still hasn't filled it yet, we understand that everyone is busy preparing the upcoming exams, and might not be active in discord during this period, so we decided to Extend the deadline until Next Saturday -> January 3rd, 2026 This will be the final deadline, and anyone that fails to fill the Data Gathering at the end of it will no longer be considered a member and may be Kicked out the server. Please check also with your friends in the server if they have the @Not Filled role and remind them to fill it asap, deadline 03/01/2026 14:59 we hope you understand this is necessary for us before proceeding with the learning season, and good luck m3a 9raytkom 🫡 Here is the link : https://forms.gle/nVkcMXz1gWrPGcbs7

? عادل 30/12/2025 13:17

Build IT - Official Closure & Results

Slm 3lykom @MC BOUNADEM After 5 demanding days of deep research, technical documentation, and real-world implementation, Build IT has officially come to an end. Huge respect to all participants who stayed committed, collaborated, and delivered until the very end

Top 3 Teams

Based on concept mastery, clarity of explanation, and implementation quality, here are the Winners:
  • Team So99or - @! 4m._8n @iمان @pitchou @Soner @! وائلہ
  • Team OptiGami - @Nirmou @nisbenz @Ryo @Selma Insaf @ᴠɪxᴇɴ
  • Team Pioneers - @Asma Soltani @camatrauma @Cerinee @Maya @مـروة

Honorable Mentions

These teams stood out strongly and deserve special recognition:
  • For their strong potentiel: Team ForgeIT
  • For their great idea: Team ArchITects

Final Message

Ranking aside, everyone who participated won real experience. Your solutions was far above our expectations What you learned here will matter far beyond this event wlh. So keep refining it, keep questioning, and most importantly, KEEP Building. Also hdk hwa w9t revisions. Tsma bi tawfi9 nchllh with your exams chabiba 7eto raskom w nchllh fiha khir
# اللَّهُمَّ لَا سَهْلَ إِلَّا مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا، وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الصَّعْبَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلًا. # اللَّهُمَّ وَفِّقْنَا فِي دِرَاسَتِنَا، وَاشْرَحْ صُدُورَنَا، وَافْتَحْ عَلَيْنَا فَهْمًا وَحِكْمَةً، وَاجْعَلِ النَّجَاحَ حَلِيفَنَا.

FINAL Reminder

Salam 3likom @MC BOUNADEM , hope you are all doing well and that your revisions are going smoothly. The Data Gathering Form closes tomorrow (Saturday, January 3rd, 2026). This is the final deadline — no extensions. Members who fail to submit the form by the deadline will no longer be considered active and may be removed from the server.

If you have the @Not Filled role

  • Please make sure to fill the form NOW and notify your friends who haven’t filled it yet Form link: https://forms.gle/nVkcMXz1gWrPGcbs7 Good luck with your exams and take care

Hola dear @MC BOUNADEM , hope you’re all doing amazing! Just dropping by to wish you the BEST of luck in your exams. Stay confident, focused, and trust all the effort you’ve put in ... and even if you feel like you haven’t revised enough yet, there’s still time: put in some effort and do your best, it truly makes a difference. ربي يوفقكم ويحفظكم And don’t forget your duaa
اللَّهُمَّ لَا سَهْلَ إِلَّا مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا، وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الصَّعْبَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلًا. https://discord.com/channels/1282095800079351851/1307090173758279681/1457062937511465205
We’re all rooting for you, do your best... Wishing you success and excellence chabiba zina (edited)

MJ MIRIN 05/01/2026 13:10

Some places are chosen...Others are earned

This is the moment where “new Weavers” stop being new. The 2025 Recap carries something we hold with pride : last year’s achievements, the events, the wins. Along with the late night working sessions, the laughter and the struggles...all the things that shaped the spirit you felt… and fought to be part of. @MC BOUNADEM take a moment, Watch the recap, see your new home in action, and get to see the legacy you’re inheriting . You didn't just choose a section now, you chose people, values, and a place where effort is seen and growth is shared. You earned your seat at this table . Take a moment to feel that

Shout-out to our artist * @!+,+! * for making us relive this masterpiece

A huge thank you for pouring heart and care into this recap and turning memories into something we’ll always look back on Watch the 2025 Recap here Let it fill you with pride. Let it remind you why you're here.

Your chapter starts now. Let’s write it together

# and make 2026 unforgettable !

? عادل 09/01/2026 05:25

LIVE TECH TALK TONIGHT

Slm 3lykom @MC BOUNADEM Tonight, the IT Section jabetlkom a special live talk with Abdelaziz Brahmi, co-founder of Nordlys, an Algerian startup based in the UK that is building next-generation AI coding systems competing with products from the biggest tech companies in the world. cherfouna b 7oudourkom bach nketrolkom menha

How an Algerian-built startup used a brand-new AI concept to challenge Big Tech

Today at 8:30 PM

Live on Google Meet

This is not a workshop and not a sales pitch. It’s a real technical & startup story, told directly by the person who built the system.

Why this talk is special?

  • Built by Algerian founders, competing on a global AI stage
  • Uses an original Mixture of Models approach instead of a single LLM
  • Direct insight into how modern AI coding agents are designed and used
  • A rare chance to see real technology, not marketing slides

Speaker rho mwejedelkom SURPRISE chba during the session

Speaker: Abdelaziz Brahmi LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/abdelaziz-brahmi/ Product: Nordlys - a model-first AI lab (edited)
Introduction - Nordlys
Welcome to Nordlys - a model-first AI lab building a Mixture of Models model.

!! justLeR 13/01/2026 12:45

Dear @MC BOUNADEM

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته Hope u’re all doing well, and Inshallah rabi ywefa9kom f ur exams Today majinach nannounciw events wela any club activity

this message is urgent and comes from the heart.

We always say that we are a family, in good times and in difficult moments, and today is one of those moments where we need to stand together. One of our dedicated members is currently facing a very difficult situation. His brother is in a coma in a hospital in China, and his condition is extremely critical. At the same time, the family is struggling financially due to the very high hospital expenses. For now, the priority is to cover the hospital fees, so that inshallah he can stabilize and eventually be brought back to Algeria. After discussion among the executive members, we decided to organize a money collection to support our brother during this hard time. Every contribution, no matter how small, truly makes a difference. Out of respect, the member’s identity will remain anonymous. Li y9der ymed w li yheb ycharek marhba, even the smallest help counts. w li maya9derch yetfekro b duaa Khassatan rana f chahr Rajab fakthiro men duʿaa w matensawch khokom. Our goal is to collect as much as possible, as soon as possible. Members in charge of the collection: @!! justLeR @Abderrahmane.ts @! AssiaLyna @eyness ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ You can hand ur contribution directly at the club HQ to one of the executive members, or send it

via CCP: 0027992309 59

or

via Baridimob: 00799999002799230959

جزاكم الله خيرًا، ونسأل الله أن يمنّ عليه بالشفاء، وأن يرده سالمًا إلى أهله. Thank you for your support.

! Redha ta3 MCC 18/01/2026 11:00
Salam everyone @MC BOUNADEM Now that we're all familiar with the MoM announcements, Allow me to go straight to the point : Last December was a month where growth mattered more than perfection — learning by doing, embracing feedback, and striving to improve with each task. It demanded consistency, responsibility, and the ability to Always deliver in time without reminders. And one member clearly stood out by doing exactly that!

Member of the Month – December

Karroum Imad Yacine @3imed

This title was earned through exceptional dedication, seriousness and reliability — well deserved Strong contributions were also made across multiple departments this month, and they deserve to be highlighted. Our Honorable Mentions • From Game Dev: @Remolyn Ouarab Lyna • From IT: @سليمان Mahammed Abdallah Slimane • From Design: @haruki Noureddine Hadil Narimane @Noor Benhabiles Nour El Houda • From Marketing: @RaaHxm Bensalem Abderrahim @! Sara Alaa Boussaha Sara Alaa • From Multimedia: @amel. Chouli Amel El Batoul @FAZIL Reggaz Fazil Aimen Omar • From OPS: @yago Hiba Ferrani @モウナ🌸 Nedjoum Mouna Hanane • From Relex: @!! iNeL !! Inel Hadjaissa @!Malikou. Aidoussi Abdelmalek • From Development: @! وائلہ Wail Mansour Ouahchia @Asma Soltani Asma Soltani Congratulations to everyone mentioned above. Your consistency and effort do not go unnoticed — keep pushing, keep improving, and keep setting the standard. Well done

this message is urgent and comes from the heart.

We always say that we are a family, in good times and in difficult moments, and today is one of those moments where we need to stand together. One of our dedicated members is currently facing a very difficult situation. His brother is in a coma in a hospital in China, and his condition is extremely critical. At the same time, the family is struggling financially due to the very high hospital expenses. For now, the priority is to cover the hospital fees, so that inshallah he can stabilize and eventually be brought back to Algeria. After discussion among the executive members, we decided to organize a money collection to support our brother during this hard time. Every contribution, no matter how small, truly makes a difference. Out of respect, the member’s identity will remain anonymous. Li y9der ymed w li yheb ycharek marhba, even the smallest help counts. w li maya9derch yetfekro b duaa Khassatan rana f chahr Rajab fakthiro men duʿaa w matensawch khokom. ! AssiaLyna 25/01/2026 11:46
Hey @MC BOUNADEM Hope you’re doing well, and khdemto chwiya f ur exams nchallah

Guess Who is Back ? : Micro Hack

What is Micro Hack? Micro Hack is an external hackathon organized by Micro Club. Building on the success of previous editions, Micro Hack returns this year with its 3rd edition, featuring an enriched format and a stronger ambition. Curious to know more ? We’re happy to officially announce that the Micro Hack 3.0 website is LIVE Make sure to check it out, it’s honestly u’ll find more details there. Big shoutout to:
  • @Micro Hack 3.0 ui/ux and @Micro Hack 3.0 Dev without forgetting @Micro Hack 3.0 Marketing for their work quality and dedication that turned into this amazing website,GGs
  • @Micro Hack 3.0 Design and @Micro Hack 3.0 Multimedia for the Registrations Are Open post ur creativity and execution were on top. GGs I’m also here to announce that we are hosting a....

General Meeting

This week on Wednesday 28/01 at 9:30 PM Your presence is mandatory, as we’ll be discussing important and serious topics, so please make sure to be there it really matters. You’ll get all the details during the meeting. See you all here : https://discord.com/channels/1282095800079351851/1292866106742014043 Have a good night everyone (edited)
microclub_usthb
Registrations are officially open now, MicroHack 3.0 is lit! Spots going fast, no time to wait! Check the link in bio, get your team, and let's start the action. Who's joining us? 3 days of pure energy coming Don't miss it – grab your spot today! Credits for : @yassxsser for the incredible work

! Redha ta3 MCC 28/01/2026 14:26

Salaaam @MC BOUNADEM

I hope everyone is doing great! for those who couldn't join today's general meeting, Here's what you missed : After the huge success of the first two editions, Our iconic Hackathon MicroHack is coming back stronger than ever with Micro Hack 3.0 And now to make this edition just as successful, we need YOU. This is your perfect chance to get involved with us, display your motivation and discover how a hackathon works from the inside. So if you're interested in joining the staff Fill out the registration FORM and be part of the team that makes it happen! A great event needs a great staff, and we’re confident that together we can make Micro Hack 3.0 another unforgettable success Event details: Location: Cyber space - USTHB Date: February 5th to 8th

IMPORTANT NOTE

  • When filling out the staff form, please make sure that you are available during all the time slots you select, as we’ll be relying on your presence throughout those periods.
  • Leaving the Cyber Space during your assigned shift is strictly prohibited.
Once your shift starts, you are expected to remain on site for the entire duration..
  • For those choosing night shifts:
Please keep in mind that leaving the university after 20:00 is not permitted, since the university gates will be closed. Make sure this works for you before selecting night periods.
  • Access to the event will be limited to selected participants and staff members only.
To keep things organized, anyone who is not selected is asked not to attend the event.
  • On February 7th, there will be the PhD admission exam that will take place at USTHB.
Because of this, el Cous will likely be unavailable that day, so please plan ahead.
  • A list of event needs will be shared very soon,
along with a small checklist of items staff members should bring if they are selected.
44
17
1
14:26
Staff form closes on February 1st at 8:00 PM.
32
! nazim 02/02/2026 12:11
Hello dear @MC BOUNADEM , As part of the preparation for MicroHack 3.0, several needs have been identified, including logistics, materials... Please check the list below & if you’re able to bring any of the listed items or help with anything mentioned, that would be so helpful for us List Of Needs If ou want to bring any item, please contact : Event Responsibles: @Djo^^ @! nazim Staff Responsibles: @aroua✨ @LOKOU STRIKE Important note: The organizers mentioned above will be present at the HQ tomorrow. If you can bring any of the listed items, you will find them there. The HQ will be closed from tomorrow until Sunday for event preparation. Make sure no personal belongings or equipment are left inside during this period. Thank you for your support. Every journey starts with a Micro idea! (edited)
Needs from Mc members Micro Hack 3.0

Multimedia Department Registrations Are Now Open!

Hello @MC BOUNADEM We’re excited to announce that registrations for the Multimedia Department are officially open, with a limited number of spots available. This is your opportunity to join the team behind the club’s visual identity and creative content. If you’re interested in:
  • Photography
  • Videography
  • Video editing
  • 2d/3d Motion
then this is your chance

Form closing date:

February 7th at 11:59 PM

Registration Link

If you have any questions or encounter any issues, feel free to DM either me @RAFIX or @unsss Good luck to everyone, and let the creativity begin

Ayaa with 2 A's 09/02/2026 10:01

@MC BOUNADEM ARE YOU READY?

We’re happy to announce that we will be hosting the 1st Game Design Talk entitled :

Game Design by Constraint

In this talk, we’ll explore how limitations (mechanics, time, resources, rules...) can actually push creativity instead of blocking it. You’ll learn how working within constraints helps designers make clearer decisions, build more focused gameplay, and turn simple ideas into engaging game concepts. It’s a great opportunity to understand how real design problems are solved and how constraints can become one of your strongest design tools. "That's very cool Ayaa but when is that?" Well it's Tomorrow !! 8:00 PM In MC GATHERING VC Hosted by our talented ex-team leader and one of the greatest alumnis @NANOVIĆ Whether you’re into game design or just curious about how games are shaped behind the scenes, this talk will give you useful insights and practical ways to think about your own projects Don’t miss it!

Dev Department Registrations Are Now Open!

Salem aelikom @MC BOUNADEM , We’re thrilled to announce that registrations for the Dev Department are officially open, and spots are limited! This is your chance to join the team building the club’s digital projects, tools, and platforms. If you’re interested in:
  • Open Source Projects
  • Club related projects
  • Web development (Frontend & Backend)
  • Mobile app development
  • AI / Machine Learning projects
then this is your opportunity to contribute and grow !!!!!!!!

Form closing date:

February 12th at 11:59 PM

Join us

If you have any questions or run into any issues, feel free to DM either me @! يُونس or @AM!NEEE marhba bikom !

16
! KENPACHI 13/02/2026 07:02

@MC BOUNADEM READY FOR ROUND TWO?

We’re excited to announce our 2nd Game Design Talk titled :

How to Think Like a Game Designer

This session will focus on how game designers see and shape ideas, and how they turn raw concepts into enjoyable gameplay experiences. You’ll discover how to look at games through a designer’s lens, understand player behavior, and make design decisions that improve clarity and fun. It’s a great chance to explore the thought process behind successful games and to learn how to approach your own ideas in a more structured and creative way. Tomorrow 8:00 PM In MC GATHERING VC Presented again by the one and only @NANOVIĆ Whether you’re passionate about game design or simply curious about how games are imagined and built, this talk will bring you new perspectives and practical tips for your future projects

Design Department Registrations Are Now Open !

No, this isn't a fever dream (lol) we're finally happy to announce that we have opened the doors ! This is a sign for you @MC BOUNADEM , aka our dear creative members, to join ! if you're interested in : ️ Graphic Design (posters, social media contents, layouts, typography...) ️ Branding & visual identity (logo conception, color palette, assets..) ️ UI/UX (user research, prototyping, usability, interfaces..) ️ Printables design (banners, stickers, pins, t-shirts, badges ...) ️ ... And mooreeeee ! & whether you're a beginner, here to learn, grow or showcase your creativity and skills, we'd love to have you on board 9en3ona bien mea your motivation khwti

hurry up there isn't much time left , i'd also like to clarify about some points so read carefully ! @MC BOUNADEM
  • don't waste too much time on moodboard, keep it really simple, we've seen a lot of you being indecisive & stressed about it, while the criterias isn't only based on that, we also do see mostly your motivation & your dedication so no worries don't pressure yourself a lot !
  • don't forget to give us viewing access to your drive submitted.
  • cross dep is on ! don't miss out.

  • don't waste too much time on moodboard, keep it really simple, we've seen a lot of you being indecisive & stressed about it, while the criterias isn't only based on that, we also do see mostly your motivation & your dedication so no worries don't pressure yourself a lot !
  • don't forget to give us viewing access to your drive submitted.
  • cross dep is on ! don't miss out.

MJ MIRIN 16/02/2026 06:00

You know how recruiters scroll through CVs

ᶠᵃˢᵗ, ˡᶦⁿᵉ ᵃᶠᵗᵉʳ ˡᶦⁿᵉ, ⁿᵃᵐᵉ ᵃᶠᵗᵉʳ ⁿᵃᵐᵉ… Until something makes them PAUSE Well, We are putting that fancy PDF under the spotlight, in a conference goes under the Title of :

Certification: A Career Accelerator

Hosted by Professor BABA ALI In this session, we’ll explore:

* What a certification truly represents

* Whether it makes a real difference on a CV

* When to get certified — before or after graduation

* And how it compares to platforms like YouTube, Coursera, and others

Then we open the debate: -Can a certification replace experience? -Is it worth the investment? -What’s the best format — in-person, online, hybrid? Wednesday 18/02 13:00 – 15:30 La salle de conférence ( faculté d’informatique) 1H Presentation + 1H Round Table and REMEMBER Dear : @MC BOUNADEM sometimes, the difference between "next🫤 " and “interview ” ## is one line on a page

Ayaa with 2 A's 16/02/2026 08:19

COLOR THEORY IS COMING TO YOU @MC BOUNADEM

The Game Dev section is hosting a Color Theory Talk, and it’s all about learning how colors really work in games and visual design In this talk, we’ll: Understand color as a concept Learn how colors can deliver a message or create a specific feeling for the viewer Discover how to choose the right colors for your projects And break it all down by analyzing real professional works If you’ve ever wondered why some art “feels right” visually, if you are struggling with colors especially for technical departments , this workshop will give you the answers Tuesday, February 17th 1:00 PM → 2:30 PM The conference room of the cs faculty Hosted by THE TALENTED @Sonic Please make sure to fill in the attendance form so we can confirm your spot! Don’t miss this chance to level up your visual skills See you there! https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfPK-_knKShbCKH1xsJp2Ul3Ys7yYgjReQTihdrfCTPCuVxxA/viewform?usp=dialog (edited)
Game Dev Talk Attendance
This talk is your gate to learn the most important concept of art, color theory! Don’t miss your chance to discover everything about colors, so make sure to fill out the form carefully to confirm your attendance. February 17th, 2026 From 01:00 PM to 02:30 PM Conference Room, Faculty of Computer Science - USTHB See You There !

Marketing department registrations are FINALLY OPEN!!

Ever fallen for a marketing campaign and thought, “How did they get me?” Now imagine creating that effect yourself… or building a brand from zero! Sounds nice, right ? Then you are in the right place, fellas! Our department is here to turn those ambitions into reality! @MC BOUNADEM Get ready to master:
  • Branding & identity making.
  • Communication strategies & social media analytics.
  • Scripting, storytelling & copywriting.
And much more as we dive deep into the marketing world! Wanna sneak a peek ? Attend our online workshop hosted by the two legends @! Ja3ffar & @sara.alaa :

Behind the Hype: How Marketing Really Works

When ? Tomorrow, TUESDAY AT 9PM Where ? MC Gathering PS: Cross-department legends you’re welcome too! Use the same registration link to hop in Soo all you gotta do now is fill the

Registration link

Deadline : 19th February (edited)

Abderrahmane.ts 18/02/2026 13:00

Ramadan Mubarak | رمضان مبارك

السلام عليكم و رحمة الله و بركاته @MC BOUNADEM بمناسبة حلول شهر رمضان المبارك، نحمد الله سبحانه وتعالى الذي أكرمنا ببلوغه، فهو موسم عظيم للخير والرحمة والبركات، وفرصة متجددة للتقرب إلى الله وزيادة الحسنات رمضان ليس مجرد امتناع عن الطعام والشراب، بل هو محطة إيمانية نعيد فيها ترتيب أولوياتنا، ونزكي نفوسنا، ونسمو بأخلاقنا وأعمالنا. إنه فرصة لتعزيز القيم، ومراجعة الذات، والعمل على تطويرها روحيًا وشخصيًا ومهنيًا. استثمروا هذه الأيام المباركة في تنمية مهاراتكم، وتوسيع معارفكم، وبناء عادات إيجابية تدوم لما بعد رمضان. اجعلوا منه نقطة انطلاقة نحو التغيير الأفضل، وكونوا مصدر إلهام وأثر طيب في محيطكم. نسأل الله أن يبارك لنا في أوقاتنا وأعمالنا، وأن يرزقنا الإخلاص والقبول، وأن يجمعنا دائمًا على الخير والمحبة. كما نرجو منكم ألّا تنسوا أخانا @rcym (رَحِمَهُ اللهُ) من صالح دعائكم في هذه الأيام المباركة، فقد انتقل إلى رحمة الله تعالى. نسأل الله أن يغفر له ويرحمه رحمةً واسعة. Micro Club مكتب

هبة - Djezzy Survivor 19/02/2026 14:05

OPS Recruitment Are Officially Open!

The wait is over! The Logistics and Event Management Department (OPS) is opening its doors, and this time, we’re bringing something special with us … # HackOPS 4.0 is HERE! For the first time in Micro Club history, HackOPS is open to ALL MC members! Whether you want to:
  • Join the OPS department.
  • Or simply challenge yourself and gain a full brand new experience. HackOPS 4.0 is your opportunity!

What is HackOPS?

HackOPS is an internal OPS competition where you: • Create a brand-new event idea . • Build the full planning and documentation of it. • Present your output to convince the juries.

When??

  • Online phase: 22nd – 28th February
  • IRL Day: 1st March

Note:

• Participating in HackOPS is NOT mandatory to join OPS, however, it significantly increases your chances of being accepted. • You can participate in HackOPS even if you don’t want to join OPS.

Why Join OPS?

OPS is the department that transforms:
“Ideas” → into real, structured, impactful events.”
From planning to execution, we are the ones behind the scenes making events real. We recruit from action, not just words PS: Cross-department people you’re welcome too!

Fill out the form carefully and show us what you’re capable of.

Deadline : 21st February Good luck to everyone w saha shourkoum @MC BOUNADEM (edited)

The Event Management in the Real World - Not for the Weak.

Salem @MC BOUNADEM Since the registrations to OPS & HackOPS4.0 has been closed.... Makhalinakoumch hakak Have you ever wondered…
  • What’s the difference between organizing an event in a club and in a professional company?
  • What should you focus on to make your event actually succeed?
  • What is the real standard of success in the industry?
You will definitely get your answer🫵

From a professional, an expert, an Event Project Manager...

Someone we’ve worked with on many events, DAS, Algeria 2.0... Some of you may know her... Some of you may have heard of her...

FAIROUZ

FINAL GAME DESIGN TALK INCOMING @MC BOUNADEM

The Game Dev section is wrapping up the LEARNING SEASON with a special final talk focused on Game Feel & Polishing, the part that turns a project into a real game If your game works… but doesn’t feel right, this talk is for you. If you want your game to feel smoother, clearer, and more satisfying , you definitely don’t want to miss this one Saturday, February 28th 1:30 PM → 3:00 PM The conference room of the CS faculty Hosted by THE TALENTED @NANOVIĆ Don’t forget to fill in the attendance form so we can organize properly and save your seat! See you there! https://forms.gle/DhpcA4gbeuAHmLNQ8 (edited)
Last Game Design Talk Attendance
This talk focuses on game feel and polishing,the final steps in making a game truly enjoyable to play. We’ll explore how player input, feedback, sound, and visual effects shape the overall experience, and how refining small details can significantly elevate the quality of a game Don’t miss your chance,so make sure to fill out the form carefu...

Something Big is Coming…

Slm 3lykom @MC BOUNADEM Saha ftorkom, after a long time of preparation i'm finally thrilled to announce thaaat: A mysterious signal has been picked up… Intriguing. Cryptic. Hard to ignore. This Ramadan, the IT Section is preparing an experience for everyone in the club, whether you’re a seasoned coder, a curious beginner, or someone who simply enjoys smart challenges. We’ve carefully designed this so no one feels left behind, and so that being part of it will be genuinely exciting and rewarding. This isn’t just another announcement… It’s the start of something that will spark your curiosity and make you want to be part of the journey. We’ll reveal more only when the time is right

General Meeting

Saturday, 28th February 22:00 Event Link Come be among the first to catch the signal. Something exciting, and worth your time nchllh is waiting...

رسيم 28/02/2026 15:36

MicroCode Is Finally Here!.

Slm 3ylkom @MC BOUNADEM The wait is over. The signal has been decoded. This Ramadan, MicroCode – A Coding Journey Through Space invites you to step into a story-driven competition where every challenge is a planet, every solution earns a star, and every second counts.

What’s waiting for you?

  • 1–3 challenges released daily
  • Two-part puzzles (solve Part 1 to unlock Part 2)
  • Live leaderboard (speed matters)
  • Any programming language allowed (no previous experience requirement, only problem-solving skills)
  • Top solvers qualify for the IRL Finale + Iftar
Whether you're a seasoned coder or just getting started, this experience was built so everyone can participate, compete, and improve.

First Transmission Incoming

Sunday, 01 March 22:00 sharp Be there when the clock hits, the fastest earn the most points.

Join the Discord Server

This is more than a competition. It’s a mission. See you tomorrow at 22:00.
Invite to join a server
Micro Code 2.0
